NAMOChemical
EV в░░ьё░вдг ВєїВъгВЮў
ьњѕВДѕ ьўЂВІа
вѓўвфеВ╝ђв»ИВ╣╝ВЮў QMSвіћ ВѕўВъЁЖ▓ђВѓг(IQC), Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг(PQC), ВХюьЋўЖ▓ђВѓг(OQC)вЦ╝ ьєхьЋЕ Ж┤ђвдгьЋўВЌг Ж│аьњѕВДѕ в░░ьё░вдг ВєїВъгВЮў ВЋѕВаЋВаЂВЮИ ВЃЮВѓ░ВЮё ВДђВЏљьЋЕвІѕвІц.
IQC
ВѕўВъЁ ьњѕВДѕ Ж▓ђВѓг
PQC
Ж│хВаЋ ьњѕВДѕ Ж▓ђВѓг
OQC
ВХюьЋў ьњѕВДѕ Ж▓ђВѓг

QMS вАюЖиИВЮИ

вАюЖиИВЮИ ьЏё ьњѕВДѕЖ┤ђвдгВІюВіцьЁюВЮё ВѓгВџЕьЋЕвІѕвІц.

вїђВІюв│┤вЊюРђ║ВѕўВъЁЖ▓ђВѓг(IQC)

ВъЁЖ│аЖ▓ђВѓг вЊ▒вАЮ

ВъЉВё▒ / Ж▓ђьєа / Ві╣ВЮИ

ьџїВЏљ DB ВЌ░вЈЎ
Рџа№ИЈ вЊ▒вАЮвљю ьџїВЏљВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц. ве╝Вађ ьџїВЏљВЮё вЊ▒вАЮьЋўвЕ┤ ВъЉВё▒Въљ/Ж▓ђьєаВъљ/Ві╣ВЮИВъљвЦ╝ ВёаьЃЮьЋа Вѕў ВъѕВіхвІѕвІц.

LOT
вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ

ВъЁЖ│аЖ▓ђВѓг вфЕвАЮ

ВЮ╝ВъљLOTьўЉваЦВЌЁВ▓┤ьњѕвфЕВъЁЖ│аВѕўвЪЅЖ▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅвХѕвЪЅВѕўвЪЅВхюВбЁьїљВаЋВъЉВё▒ВъљЖ▓ђьєаВъљВі╣ВЮИВъљВъЉВЌЁ
вїђВІюв│┤вЊюРђ║Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг(PQC)
Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг вЊ▒вАЮ

Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг вЊ▒вАЮ

ВъЉВё▒ / Ж▓ђьєа / Ві╣ВЮИ

ьџїВЏљ DB ВЌ░вЈЎ
Рџа№ИЈ вЊ▒вАЮвљю ьџїВЏљВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц. ве╝Вађ ьџїВЏљВЮё вЊ▒вАЮьЋ┤ВБ╝ВёИВџћ.

вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ

вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ
вХђВаЂьЋЕ в│┤Ж│аВёю (NCR)
вХђВаЂьЋЕ ВѓгьЋГВЮё вЊ▒вАЮ┬иЖ┤ђвдгьЋўЖ│а ВІюВаЋВА░В╣ўвЦ╝ ВХћВаЂьЋЕвІѕвІц.

вХђВаЂьЋЕ в│┤Ж│аВёю вЊ▒вАЮ

ВъЉВё▒ / Ж▓ђьєа / Ві╣ВЮИ

ьџїВЏљ DB ВЌ░вЈЎ
Рџа№ИЈ вЊ▒вАЮвљю ьџїВЏљВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц. ве╝Вађ ьџїВЏљВЮё вЊ▒вАЮьЋ┤ВБ╝ВёИВџћ.

в│┤Ж│аВёю ВѓгВаёв│┤ЖИ░

PREVIEW
ВъЉВё▒Въљ
-
Ж▓ђьєаВъљ
-
Ві╣ВЮИВъљ
-

вХђВаЂьЋЕ в│┤Ж│аВёю вфЕвАЮ

в░юВЃЮВЮ╝Въљв│┤Ж│аВёюв▓ѕьўИВюаьўЋвХђВёюLOTьњѕвфЕВѕўвЪЅвІ┤вІ╣ВъљВЃЂьЃюВъЉВё▒ВъљЖ▓ђьєаВъљВі╣ВЮИВъљВъЉВЌЁ
ьўЉваЦВѓг ьўёьЎЕ
ьўЉваЦВЌЁВ▓┤ вЊ▒вАЮ в░Ј ВЃЂьЃювЦ╝ Ж┤ђвдгьЋЕвІѕвІц.

ьўЉваЦВѓг вЊ▒вАЮ

ьўЉваЦВѓг вфЕвАЮ

ВЌЁВ▓┤вфЁвІ┤вІ╣ВъљВаёьЎћв▓ѕьўИвХёвЦўВЃЂьЃюВъЉВЌЁ
ВИАВаЋЖИ░ Ж┤ђвдг

ВИАВаЋЖИ░ вЊ▒вАЮ / ВѕўВаЋ

Рё╣№ИЈ ВхюЖи╝ ЖхљВаЋВЮ╝Ж│╝ ЖхљВаЋВБ╝ЖИ░ ВъЁваЦ ВІю вІцВЮї ЖхљВаЋВЮ╝ВЮ┤ ВъљвЈЎ Ж│ёВѓ░вљЕвІѕвІц. вІцВЮї ЖхљВаЋВЮ╝ ЖИ░Вцђ 30ВЮ╝ ВЮ┤вѓ┤віћ ЖхљВаЋВўѕВаЋ, ВДђвѓю Ж▓йВџ░ ЖхљВаЋВ┤ѕЖ│╝вАю ьЉюВІювљЕвІѕвІц.

ВИАВаЋЖИ░ вфЕвАЮ

Ж┤ђвдгв▓ѕьўИВИАВаЋЖИ░вфЁвфевЇИвфЁВаюВА░ВѓгВюёВ╣ўЖхљВаЋВБ╝ЖИ░ВхюЖи╝ ЖхљВаЋВЮ╝вІцВЮї ЖхљВаЋВЮ╝ВЃЂьЃюв╣ёЖ│аВѓгВДёВъЉВЌЁ
Ж│хВаЋвіЦваЦ вХёВёЮ (SPC)
вХёВёЮ вЕћвЅ┤
ВЌЉВЁђ / CSV ВЌЁвАювЊю
­ЪЊЂ
RawвЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░_ВъЁваЦ ВІюьіИ вўљвіћ CSV ьїїВЮ╝ВЮё вЊювъўЖиИьЋўЖ▒░вѓў ВёаьЃЮ

РџЎ вХёВёЮ ВА░Ж▒┤ ┬и COA ЖИ░Вцђ

COA
вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ьЋГвфЕВЮђ Cp/Cpk вїђВІа Cpu вўљвіћ Cpl ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю ьїљВаЋьЋЕвІѕвІц. ВќЉВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ьЋГвфЕвДї Cp/CpkвЦ╝ ьЉюВІюьЋЕвІѕвІц.
В┤Ю ВІювБїВѕў (N)
-
вХђвХёЖх░ Вѕў (K)
-
ВаёВ▓┤ ьЈЅЖиа (X╠ё)
-
Жх░вѓ┤ ьЉюВцђьјИВ░е (¤Ѓ)
-
Cpu / Cpk
-
ВхюВбЁ ьїљВаЋ
-

Ж│хВаЋвіЦваЦ (CAPABILITY)

Ж┤ђвдгвЈё (CONTROL CHART)

ЖиюЖ▓Е / PPM

Ж│хВаЋ вХёВёЮ В░еьіИ

ЖиюЖ▓ЕВёа ьЈгьЋе вХёьЈг вХёВёЮ

Ж│хВаЋвіЦваЦ ВДђьЉю

Raw вЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░ ВъЁваЦ ┬и Ж┤ђвдг (вХђвХёЖх░ x ВИАВаЋЖ░њ)

ВИАВаЋЖ░њ ВѕўВаЋ ВдЅВІю Xbar/R, Ж┤ђвдгвЈё, Cp/Cpk, PPMВЮ┤ ВъгЖ│ёВѓ░вљЕвІѕвІц. ВхюВєї 100ea ЖИ░ВцђВъЁвІѕвІц.

ьЈЅЖиа Ж┤ђвдгвЈё (ВІцВІюЖ░ё)

в▓ћВюё Ж┤ђвдгвЈё (ВІцВІюЖ░ё)

Ж│хВаЋ вХёВёЮ

Ж░юв│ёЖ░њ Ж┤ђвдгвЈё

ВЮ┤вЈЎв▓ћВюё Ж┤ђвдгвЈё

вХёьЈг вХёВёЮ

ВхюЖи╝ 25Ж░ю ВИАВаЋЖ░њ

Ж│хВаЋ ьєхЖ│ё

ВЋѕВаЋВё▒ вХёВёЮ

ьЈЅЖиа Ж┤ђвдгвЈё

в▓ћВюё Ж┤ђвдгвЈё

Ж┤ђвдг ЖИ░ВцђЖ░њ

ВЮ┤ВЃЂ ВІаьўИ ВЋївд╝

Вѓ░ьЈг вХёВёЮ

вХђвХёЖх░ в▓ћВюё ВѕюВюё

ВЮ┤ВЃЂВ╣ў вХёьЈг

ВИАВаЋ в│┤Ж│аВёю

1. ВџћВЋй ВаЋв│┤

2. Ж┤ђвдг ЖИ░Вцђ

3. Ж│хВаЋ ВаЂьЋЕВё▒

ьъѕВіцьєаЖиИвъе

ьЈЅЖиа Ж┤ђвдгвЈё

4. ВИАВаЋЖ░њ ЖИ░вАЮ

SPC ВађВъЦ вфЕвАЮ

ВЮ╝Въљв│┤Ж│аВёюв▓ѕьўИLOTьЋГвфЕNьЈЅЖиа¤ЃCp/CpkPpkьїљВаЋВъЉВЌЁ
LOT ВХћВаЂ
ВЎёВаюьњѕ / ВЏљвБї LOTвЦ╝ Ж▓ђВЃЅьЋЕвІѕвІц.

LOT ВХћВаЂ Ж▓░Ж│╝

ВъЉВЌЁВЮ╝ВъљВЎёВаюьњѕ LOTВъЉВЌЁВъљВѕюв▓ѕВЏљвБївфЁВЌЁВ▓┤вфЁВЏљвБї LOTьѕгВъЁвЪЅьѕгВъЁВІюЖ░ё
ЖхљВюАЖ┤ђвдг Рђ║ ЖхљВюАв│┤Ж│аВёю

ЖхљВюАв│┤Ж│аВёю ВъЉВё▒

ЖхљВюАВаЋв│┤, В░ИВёЮьўёьЎЕ, ЖхљВюАЖ▓░Ж│╝, ВъЉВё▒/Ж▓ђьєа/Ві╣ВЮИВЮё ьЋю ьЎћвЕ┤ВЌљВёю Ж┤ђвдгьЋЕвІѕвІц.

1. ЖхљВюАВаЋв│┤

2. В░ИВёЮьўёьЎЕ / ЖхљВюАвїђВЃЂ

вѓ┤вХђ ЖхљВюА В░ИВёЮВъљ0вфЁ
ВЎИвХђ ЖхљВюА ВўѕВаЋВъљ0вфЁ
вХѕВ░ИВъљ0вфЁ

3. ЖхљВюАЖ▓░Ж│╝

ВѓгВДёВЮё вЊювъўЖиИьЋўЖ▒░вѓў ьЂ┤вдГьЋўВЌг ВЌЁвАювЊю
JPG, PNG ьїїВЮ╝

4. ВъЉВё▒ / Ж▓ђьєа / Ві╣ВЮИ ВѕўВъЁЖ▓ђВѓг Ж▓░Въг ЖхгВА░ вЈЎВЮ╝ ВаЂВџЕ

ВъЉВё▒Въљ ВДЂЖИЅВЌљ вћ░вЮ╝ Ж▓ђьєаВъљВЎђ Ві╣ВЮИВъљЖ░ђ ВъљвЈЎВю╝вАю ВъаЖИ░Ж▒░вѓў ьЎюВё▒ьЎћвљЕвІѕвІц.
ВъЉВё▒Въљ (в│ИВЮИ)ЖиюВ╣Ў ВаЂВџЕ
-
ВёювфЁ ВЮ┤в»ИВДђ ВЌєВЮї

вАюЖиИВЮИьЋю ВъЉВё▒ВъљЖ░ђ ВъљвЈЎ ВДђВаЋвљЕвІѕвІц.

Ж▓ђьєаВъљвїђЖИ░
-
ВёювфЁ ВЮ┤в»ИВДђ ВЌєВЮї

ьЋ┤вІ╣ ВДЂЖИЅ вАюЖиИВЮИ ВІю Ж▓ђьєа Ж░ђвіЦьЋЕвІѕвІц.

Ві╣ВЮИВъљвїђЖИ░
-
ВёювфЁ ВЮ┤в»ИВДђ ВЌєВЮї

ьЋ┤вІ╣ ВДЂЖИЅ вАюЖиИВЮИ ВІю Ві╣ВЮИ Ж░ђвіЦьЋЕвІѕвІц.

Ж▓░ВъгВЃЂьЃюВъЉВё▒ВцЉ
вЊ▒вАЮвљю ьџїВЏљВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц. ве╝Вађ ьџїВЏљВЮё вЊ▒вАЮьЋ┤ВБ╝ВёИВџћ.

5. в│┤Ж│аВёю вфЕвАЮ

­Ъћј
No.ЖхљВюАвфЁЖхљВюАВЮ╝ВъљЖхљВюАЖхгвХёВъЉВё▒ВъљЖ▓░ВъгВЃЂьЃюВъЉВё▒ВЮ╝ВъЉВЌЁ

в│┤Ж│аВёю ВѓгВаёв│┤ЖИ░

0%
ьџїВЏљвЊ▒вАЮьўёьЎЕ
Ж┤ђвдгВъљ ВаёВџЕ ┬и ВДЂВ▒Ё вЊ▒вАЮВю╝вАю Ж▓ђьєаВъљ/Ві╣ВЮИВъљ ВъљЖ▓Е вХђВЌг (вХђВъЦ┬иВЮ┤Вѓг┬иВъёВЏљ ВЮ┤ВЃЂ)

ьџїВЏљ вЊ▒вАЮ / ВѕўВаЋ

Рё╣№ИЈ Ж▓ђьєаВъљ┬иВі╣ВЮИВъљ ВъљЖ▓Е ВДЂВ▒Ё: вХђВъЦ, ВЮ┤Вѓг, ВЃЂвг┤, Ваёвг┤, ВъёВЏљ, вїђьЉюВЮ┤Вѓг, вїђьЉю, ВѓгВъЦ, ьџїВъЦ, в│ИвХђВъЦ, ВІцВъЦ, Вё╝ьё░ВъЦ, CEO, CTO, COO, CFO + Ж┤ђвдгВъљ(admin) ЖХїьЋю

ьџїВЏљ вфЕвАЮ

Вё▒вфЁВЮ┤вЕћВЮ╝вХђВёювфЁВДЂВ▒ЁЖХїьЋюВЃЂьЃювЊ▒вАЮВЮ╝ВъЉВЌЁ

в╣ёв░ђв▓ѕьўИ в│ђЖ▓й

­ЪЈи Ваюьњѕ вХђВ░ЕВџЕ вЮ╝в▓е

ВИАВаЋЖИ░ ВѓгВДё

w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close(); setTimeout(()=>{w.focus();w.print();},300); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ AUTH РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function openLoginTab(t){ const toggle=(id,on)=>{const el=$(id);if(el)el.classList.toggle('active',on);}; toggle('tabLoginBtn',t==='login'); toggle('tabSignupBtn',t==='signup'); toggle('panelLogin',t==='login'); toggle('panelSignup',t==='signup'); } const REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY='namo_qms_saved_login_id'; function loadRememberedLoginId(){ const emailEl=$('loginEmail'); const chkEl=$('rememberLoginId'); if(!emailEl||!chkEl) return; const saved=(localStorage.getItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY)||'').trim(); if(saved){ emailEl.value=saved; chkEl.checked=true; } } function saveRememberedLoginId(email){ const chkEl=$('rememberLoginId'); if(!chkEl) return; if(chkEl.checked && email){ localStorage.setItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY,email); }else{ localStorage.removeItem(REMEMBER_LOGIN_ID_KEY); } } async function login(){ $('loginError').textContent=''; const email=$('loginEmail').value.trim(),pwd=$('loginPassword').value.trim(); if(!email||!pwd){$('loginError').textContent='ВЮ┤вЕћВЮ╝Ж│╝ в╣ёв░ђв▓ѕьўИвЦ╝ ВъЁваЦьЋўВёИВџћ.';return;} saveRememberedLoginId(email); const{data}=await api('/api/auth/login',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({email,password:pwd})}); if(!data?.success){$('loginError').textContent=data?.message||'вАюЖиИВЮИВЌљ ВІцьїеьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.';return;} const token=data?.token || data?.accessToken || data?.access_token || data?.data?.token || data?.data?.accessToken || data?.data?.access_token; if(token) setAuthToken(token); else sessionStorage.setItem('qms_logged_in','1'); await checkLogin(true);await loadAllвЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░(); } async function signup(){ $('signupError').textContent=''; const p={name:$('signupName').value.trim(),email:$('signupEmail').value.trim(),department:$('signupDepartment').value.trim(),title:$('signupTitle').value.trim(),password:$('signupPassword').value.trim()}; if(!p.name||!p.email||!p.password){$('signupError').textContent='Вё▒вфЁ, ВЮ┤вЕћВЮ╝, в╣ёв░ђв▓ѕьўИвіћ ьЋёВѕўВъЁвІѕвІц.';return;} const{data}=await api('/api/auth/signup',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); if(!data?.success){$('signupError').textContent=data?.message||'ьџїВЏљЖ░ђВъЁВЌљ ВІцьїеьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.';return;} alert(data.message||'ьџїВЏљЖ░ђВъЁВЮ┤ ВЎёвБївљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');openLoginTab('login'); } async function checkLogin(force=false){ // ВхюВ┤ѕ ВДёВъЁ ВІю ьєаьЂ░/вАюЖиИВЮИ ьъїьіИЖ░ђ ВЌєВю╝вЕ┤ /api/auth/meвЦ╝ ьўИВХюьЋўВДђ ВЋіВЋё 401 ВйўВєћ ВўцвЦўвЦ╝ в░ЕВДђьЋЕвІѕвІц. // вАюЖиИВЮИ ВДЂьЏёВЌљвіћ force=trueвАю ьўИВХюьЋўВЌг В┐аьѓц ВёИВЁў в░ЕВІЮвЈё Ж│ёВєЇ ВДђВЏљьЋЕвІѕвІц. if(!force && !hasLoginHint()){ showLoggedOut(); return false; } const{res,data}=await api('/api/auth/me'); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){showLoggedOut();return false;} sessionStorage.setItem('qms_logged_in','1'); const user=data.data||data.user||data; state.currentUser=user; const lp=$('loginPage'); if(lp) lp.style.display='none'; document.body.classList.remove('login-active'); const sh=document.querySelector('.shell'); if(sh) sh.style.display='flex'; updateProfileUI(user); setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applyAllSignPermissions==='function')applyAllSignPermissions();},100); setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof rebuildAllSignGrids==='function')rebuildAllSignGrids();else if(typeof applyAllSignPermissions==='function')applyAllSignPermissions();},500); return true; } function updateProfileUI(u){ const n=u?.name||'ВѓгВџЕВъљ'; if($('profileName'))$('profileName').textContent=n; if($('profileEmail'))$('profileEmail').textContent=u?.email||''; if($('profileAvatar'))$('profileAvatar').textContent=n.charAt(0)||'Вѓг'; const isAdmin=!!( u?.isAdmin === true || u?.admin === true || u?.is_admin === true || String(u?.role||'').toLowerCase()==='admin' || String(u?.role||'').includes('Ж┤ђвдгВъљ') || String(u?.permission||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.auth||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.authority||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') || String(u?.grade||'').includes('Ж┤ђвдгВъљ') || String(u?.name||'').includes('Ж┤ђвдгВъљ') || String(u?.email||'').toLowerCase().includes('admin') ); $('openUserManage').style.display=isAdmin?'block':'none'; $('usersNavBtn').style.display=isAdmin?'flex':'none'; $('adminNavTitle').style.display=isAdmin?'block':'none'; } async function logout(){await api('/api/auth/logout',{method:'POST'});clearAuthToken();closeProfileMenu();await checkLogin();} function openPwdModal(){$('passwordModal').classList.add('show');['currentPassword','newPassword','confirmPassword'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');} function closePwdModal(){$('passwordModal').classList.remove('show');} async function changePwd(){ const cp=$('currentPassword').value.trim(),np=$('newPassword').value.trim(),cf=$('confirmPassword').value.trim(); if(!cp||!np||!cf){alert('вфевЊа ьЋГвфЕВЮё ВъЁваЦьЋўВёИВџћ.');return;} if(np!==cf){alert('ВЃѕ в╣ёв░ђв▓ѕьўИ ьЎЋВЮИВЮ┤ ВЮ╝В╣ўьЋўВДђ ВЋіВіхвІѕвІц.');return;} const{data}=await api('/api/auth/change-password',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({currentPassword:cp,newPassword:np})}); alert(data?.message||'В▓ўвдгвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success)closePwdModal(); } function closeProfileMenu(){$('profileDropdown').classList.remove('show');} function goHome(){ $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); const dashBtn=document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-page="dashboard"]'); if(dashBtn)dashBtn.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active')); const dashPage=$('page-dashboard'); if(dashPage)dashPage.classList.add('active'); const content=document.querySelector('.content'); if(content)content.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}); closeProfileMenu(); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ NAV РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function bindNav(){ $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',async()=>{ const pg=btn.dataset.page; $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));btn.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));$(`page-${pg}`).classList.add('active'); setTimeout(()=>refreshSignaturePads($(`page-${pg}`)),80); if(pg==='users')await loadAdminUsers(); if(pg==='report'){populateReportSelect();loadStandaloneReport();} if(pg==='trace'){setTimeout(()=>searchTrace(),50);} }); }); $$('.sc[data-go]').forEach(card=>{ const move=()=>{ const pg=card.dataset.go; const nav=document.querySelector(`.nav-item[data-page="${pg}"]`); if(nav) nav.click(); }; card.addEventListener('click',move); card.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); move(); } }); }); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ INIT РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function initYears(){const c=new Date().getFullYear();$('dashYear').innerHTML='';for(let y=c-2;y<=c+2;y++){const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=y;o.textContent=`${y}вЁё`;if(y===c)o.selected=true;$('dashYear').appendChild(o);}} function setDefaultDates(){['incomingDate','processDate','shipmentDate','worklogDate','ncDate','spcDate'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value=todayKST();});} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ DEFAULT ITEMS РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function defIqc(){return[{item:'ВЎИЖ┤ђ',spec:'ВЮ┤вг╝ВДѕ, ьїїВєљ ВЌєВЮё Ж▓Ѓ',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'CoA',spec:'вѕёвЮй ВЌєВЮё Ж▓Ѓ',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'}];} function defPqc(){return[{item:'ВЎИЖ┤ђ',spec:'ВЮ┤ВЃЂ ВЌєВЮё Ж▓Ѓ',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаљвЈё',spec:'1,500┬▒300cp',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'Ж│аьўЋвХё',spec:'20.0┬▒1.0wt.%',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'Dmax',spec:'РЅц 10.0 ╬╝m',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаЉВ░ЕваЦ',spec:'РЅЦ 400 gf/12.7 mm',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаѕВЌ░ВађьЋГ',spec:'РЅЦ 200 M╬Е',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаёьЋ┤ВЋА ьїйВюцВё▒',spec:'< 120%',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВѕўвХё',spec:'< 2,000ppm',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'}];} function defOqc(){return[{item:'ВЎИЖ┤ђ',spec:'ВЮ┤ВЃЂ ВЌєВЮё Ж▓Ѓ',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ьЈгВъЦ',spec:'ьїїВєљ ВЌєВЮё Ж▓Ѓ',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаљвЈё',spec:'1,500┬▒300cp',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'Ж│аьўЋвХё',spec:'20.0┬▒1.0wt.%',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'Dmax',spec:'РЅц 10.0 ╬╝m',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаЉВ░ЕваЦ',spec:'РЅЦ 400 gf/12.7 mm',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаѕВЌ░ВађьЋГ',spec:'РЅЦ 200 M╬Е',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВаёьЋ┤ВЋА ьїйВюцВё▒',spec:'< 120%',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'},{item:'ВѕўвХё',spec:'< 2,000ppm',value:'',judge:'ьЋЕЖ▓Е'}];} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ ITEM EDITOR РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function renderItems(tbId,rows,type){$(tbId).innerHTML=rows.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}`).join('');} function getDraft(t){return t==='incoming'?state.incomingItemDrafts:t==='process'?state.processItemDrafts:state.shipmentItemDrafts;} function reRender(t){t==='incoming'?renderIqcItems():t==='process'?renderPqcItems():renderOqcItems();} function syncP(t){t==='incoming'?syncIqcPreview():t==='process'?syncPqcPreview():syncOqcPreview();} function bindItemDelegate(tbId){const tb=$(tbId);if(!tb)return;tb.addEventListener('input',e=>{const el=e.target,t=el.dataset.type,i=Number(el.dataset.idx),k=el.dataset.key;if(!t||isNaN(i)||!k)return;getDraft(t)[i][k]=el.value;syncP(t);}); tb.addEventListener('change',e=>{const el=e.target,t=el.dataset.type,i=Number(el.dataset.idx),k=el.dataset.key;if(!t||isNaN(i)||!k)return;getDraft(t)[i][k]=el.value;syncP(t);}); tb.addEventListener('click',e=>{const btn=e.target.closest('[data-action="removeItem"]');if(!btn)return;getDraft(btn.dataset.type).splice(Number(btn.dataset.idx),1);reRender(btn.dataset.type);}); } function renderIqcItems(){renderItems('incomingItemsTable',state.incomingItemDrafts,'incoming');syncIqcPreview();} function renderPqcItems(){renderItems('processItemsTable',state.processItemDrafts,'process');syncPqcPreview();} function renderOqcItems(){renderItems('shipmentItemsTable',state.shipmentItemDrafts,'shipment');syncOqcPreview();} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ PREVIEW РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function renderPrevRows(tbId,items){$(tbId).innerHTML=items.length?items.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}${esc(r.item||'')}${esc(r.spec||'')}${esc(r.value||'-')}${jBadge(r.judge||'ьЋЕЖ▓Е')}`).join(''):'ьЋГвфЕ ВЌєВЮї';} function syncIqcPreview(){ const items=state.incomingItemDrafts;const date=$('incomingDate').value||todayKST();const doc=generateNmDocNo(); $('incomingMetaTable').innerHTML=`вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${doc}ВЮ╝Въљ${date}LOT${esc($('incomingLot').value||'-')}ьўЉваЦВЌЁВ▓┤${esc($('incomingSupplier').value||'-')}ьњѕвфЕ${esc($('incomingItem').value||'-')}ВъЁЖ│аВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('incomingQty').value||'0')}Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('incomingCheckQty').value||'0')}вХѕвЪЅВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('incomingFailQty').value||'0')}`; renderPrevRows('incomingPreviewBody',items);$('incomingFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcIqcLot',$('incomingLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcIqcDoc',doc); } function syncPqcPreview(){ const items=state.processItemDrafts;const date=$('processDate').value||todayKST();const doc=`PQC-${date.replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; $('processMetaTable').innerHTML=`вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${doc}ВЮ╝Въљ${date}LOT${esc($('processLot').value||'-')}Вёцв╣ёвфЁ${esc($('processLine').value||'-')}ВаюьњѕвфЁ${esc($('processProduct').value||'-')}ВъЉВЌЁВА░${esc($('processShift').value||'-')}Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('processQty').value||'0')}вХѕвЪЅВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('processFailQty').value||'0')}`; renderPrevRows('processPreviewBody',items);$('processFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcPqcLot',$('processLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcPqcDoc',doc); } function syncOqcPreview(){ const items=state.shipmentItemDrafts;const date=$('shipmentDate').value||todayKST();const doc=`OQC-${date.replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; $('shipmentMetaTable').innerHTML=`вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${doc}ВЮ╝Въљ${date}LOT${esc($('shipmentLot').value||'-')}Ж│аЖ░ЮВѓг${esc($('shipmentCustomer').value||'-')}ВаюьњѕвфЁ${esc($('shipmentProduct').value||'-')}Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('shipmentQty').value||'0')}вХѕвЪЅВѕўвЪЅ${esc($('shipmentFailQty').value||'0')}в╣ёЖ│а${esc($('shipmentRemark').value||'-')}`; renderPrevRows('shipmentPreviewBody',items);$('shipmentFinalJudgeText').textContent=calcJ(items); renderBC('bcOqcLot',$('shipmentLot').value||'LOT');renderBC('bcOqcDoc',doc); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ WORKLOG LINKAGE РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function updateWorklogLinkage(){ const lot=($('worklogFinishedLot').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const box=$('worklogLinkBox'); if(!lot){box.style.display='none';return;} const iq=state.incoming.filter(r=>(r.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot); const pq=state.process.filter(r=>(r.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot); const oq=state.shipment.filter(r=>(r.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot); const all=[...iq.map(r=>({type:'IQC',lot:r.lot,date:r.date,judge:calcJ(r.items||[])})),...pq.map(r=>({type:'PQC',lot:r.lot,date:r.date,judge:calcJ(r.items||[])})),...oq.map(r=>({type:'OQC',lot:r.lot,date:r.date,judge:calcJ(r.items||[])}))]; if(!all.length){box.style.display='none';return;} box.style.display='block'; $('worklogLinkRows').innerHTML=all.map(x=>`
${x.type}${esc(x.lot)}${jBadge(x.judge)}${x.date||'-'}
`).join(''); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ Вё▒ВаЂВёю ьјўВЮ┤ВДђ РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function populateReportSelect(){ const type=$('reportType').value;const sel=$('reportSelect');sel.innerHTML=''; let arr=type==='iqc'?state.incoming:type==='pqc'?state.process:state.shipment; arr=[...arr].sort((a,b)=>(b.date||'')>(a.date||'')?1:-1); arr.forEach(r=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=r.id;o.textContent=type==='iqc'?`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.supplier}`:type==='pqc'?`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.product}`:`${r.date} | ${r.lot} | ${r.customer}`;sel.appendChild(o);}); if(arr.length)sel.value=arr[0].id; } function setReportSignature(role,data){ const cap=signRoleCap(role); const nameEl=document.getElementById(`rRpt${cap}`); if(!nameEl)return; const col=nameEl.closest('.rpsign-col'); if(!col)return; let img=col.querySelector('.rpsign-img'); if(!img){ img=document.createElement('img'); img.className='rpsign-img'; img.alt='ВаёВъљВёювфЁ'; img.style.display='none'; col.insertBefore(img,nameEl); } let dateEl=col.querySelector('.rpsign-date'); if(!dateEl){ dateEl=document.createElement('div'); dateEl.className='rpsign-date'; dateEl.style.fontSize='10px'; dateEl.style.color='#666'; dateEl.style.marginTop='2px'; const titleEl=document.getElementById(`rRpt${cap}T`); if(titleEl)titleEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',dateEl); else nameEl.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',dateEl); } if(data?.signImage){ img.src=data.signImage; img.style.display='block'; }else{ img.removeAttribute('src'); img.style.display='none'; } dateEl.textContent=data?.signDate||''; } function loadStandaloneReport(){ const type=$('reportType').value,selId=$('reportSelect').value; const arr=type==='iqc'?state.incoming:type==='pqc'?state.process:state.shipment; const row=selId?arr.find(r=>String(r.id)===String(selId)):arr[0]; if(!row){$('reportMetaTable').innerHTML='вЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░Ж░ђ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц.';$('reportBodyTable').innerHTML='';$('reportFinalText').textContent='-';return;} $('reportPageTitle').textContent=type==='iqc'?'ВъЁЖ│аЖ▓ђВѓг Вё▒ВаЂВёю (IQC Report)':type==='pqc'?'Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг Вё▒ВаЂВёю (PQC Report)':'ВХюьЋўЖ▓ђВѓг Вё▒ВаЂВёю (OQC Report)'; const docNo=`${type.toUpperCase()}-${String(row.date||'').replaceAll('-','')}-0001`; const meta=type==='iqc'? `вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${docNo}ВЮ╝Въљ${row.date||'-'}LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}ьўЉваЦВЌЁВ▓┤${esc(row.supplier||'-')}ьњѕвфЕ${esc(row.item||'-')}ВъЁЖ│аВѕўвЪЅ${row.incomingQty??'-'}`: type==='pqc'? `вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${docNo}ВЮ╝Въљ${row.date||'-'}LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}Вёцв╣ёвфЁ${esc(row.line||'-')}ВаюьњѕвфЁ${esc(row.product||'-')}Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ${row.qty??'-'}`: `вгИВёюв▓ѕьўИ${docNo}ВЮ╝Въљ${row.date||'-'}LOT${esc(row.lot||'-')}Ж│аЖ░ЮВѓг${esc(row.customer||'-')}ВаюьњѕвфЁ${esc(row.product||'-')}Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ${row.qty??'-'}`; $('reportMetaTable').innerHTML=meta; const items=Array.isArray(row.items)?row.items:[]; $('reportBodyTable').innerHTML=items.length?items.map((x,i)=>`${i+1}${esc(x.item||'')}${esc(x.spec||'')}${esc(x.value||'-')}${jBadge(x.judge||'ьЋЕЖ▓Е')}`).join(''):'ьЋГвфЕ ВЌєВЮї'; $('reportFinalText').textContent=calcJ(items); const sw=row.signWriter,sr=row.signReviewer,sa=row.signApprover; $('rRptWriter').textContent=sw?.name||'-';$('rRptWriterT').textContent=sw?.title||''; $('rRptReviewer').textContent=sr?.name||'-';$('rRptReviewerT').textContent=sr?.title||''; $('rRptApprover').textContent=sa?.name||'-';$('rRptApproverT').textContent=sa?.title||''; setReportSignature('writer',sw); setReportSignature('reviewer',sr); setReportSignature('approver',sa); setTimeout(()=>{renderBC('bcRptLot',row.lot||'LOT');renderBC('bcRptDoc',docNo);},50); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ PRINT РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ let cachedPrintIp = ''; function getPrintUser(){ const cur = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.currentUser) ? state.currentUser : null; const nameFromDom = (document.getElementById('profileName')?.textContent || '').trim(); const emailFromDom = (document.getElementById('profileEmail')?.textContent || '').trim(); return { name: cur?.name || nameFromDom || '-', email: cur?.email || emailFromDom || '', department: cur?.department || cur?.dept || '', title: cur?.title || cur?.position || '' }; } function getPrintDateTime(){ const now = new Date(); const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0'); return now.getFullYear() + '-' + pad(now.getMonth() + 1) + '-' + pad(now.getDate()) + ' ' + pad(now.getHours()) + ':' + pad(now.getMinutes()) + ':' + pad(now.getSeconds()); } async function getPrintIp(){ if(cachedPrintIp) return cachedPrintIp; try{ const res = await fetch('https://api.ipify.org?format=json',{cache:'no-store'}); const data = await res.json(); cachedPrintIp = data?.ip || '-'; }catch(e){ cachedPrintIp = '-'; } return cachedPrintIp; } async function appendPrintUserInfo(target){ if(!target) return; target.querySelectorAll('.print-user-info').forEach(x=>x.remove()); const user = getPrintUser(); const ip = await getPrintIp(); const info = document.createElement('div'); info.className = 'print-user-info'; info.textContent = 'ВХюваЦВъљ : ' + (user.name || '-') + (user.title ? ' ' + user.title : '') + (user.department ? ' / ' + user.department : '') + (user.email ? ' (' + user.email + ')' : '') + ' №йю ВХюваЦВІюЖ░ё : ' + getPrintDateTime() ; target.appendChild(info); } async function printEl(el){ if(!el) return; document.querySelectorAll('#printTarget').forEach(x=>{ x.remove(); }); const clone = el.cloneNode(true); clone.id = 'printTarget'; if(el.id==='trainingPreviewSheet') clone.classList.add('training-print-onepage'); // canvas ВёювфЁВЮђ cloneNode вЋї ЖиИвд╝ВЮ┤ в│хВѓгвљўВДђ ВЋіВю╝в»ђвАю ВЮ┤в»ИВДђвАю в│ђьЎўьЋ┤Вёю ВЮИВЄё const originalCanvases=el.querySelectorAll('canvas'); const clonedCanvases=clone.querySelectorAll('canvas'); originalCanvases.forEach((cv,i)=>{ const ccv=clonedCanvases[i]; if(!ccv)return; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.className=cv.className||'sign-pad'; img.style.width=cv.style.width||'100%'; img.style.height=cv.style.height||'76px'; img.style.objectFit='contain'; const key=(cv.dataset.signType&&cv.dataset.signRole)?`${cv.dataset.signType}:${cv.dataset.signRole}`:''; const stored=key&&window.__signImageStore&&window.__signImageStore[key]?window.__signImageStore[key].signImage:''; try{ img.src=stored||cv.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(e){ img.src=stored||''; } if(img.src)ccv.replaceWith(img); }); await appendPrintUserInfo(clone); document.body.appendChild(clone); setTimeout(()=>{ window.print(); },300); window.onafterprint = ()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#printTarget').forEach(x=>{ x.remove(); }); window.onafterprint = null; }; } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ LOAD DATA РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function normalizeSignUser(u){ if(!u)return null; const id=String(u.id ?? u.user_id ?? u.email ?? "").trim(); const name=String(u.name ?? u.username ?? "").trim(); if(!id || !name)return null; return{ id, name, email:u.email||"", department:u.department||u.dept||"", title:u.title||u.position||"", role:u.role||"user", status:u.status||"APPROVED" }; } function uniqSignUsers(list){ const m=new Map(); (list||[]).map(normalizeSignUser).filter(Boolean).forEach(u=>{ if(String(u.status||"").toUpperCase()!=="REJECTED")m.set(u.id,u); }); return Array.from(m.values()); } async function fetchUserListForSelectors(){ const endpoints = [ '/api/users/signable', '/api/users', '/api/members', '/api/auth/users', '/api/admin/users' ]; for(const url of endpoints){ try{ const {res,data} = await api(url); if(!res || !res.ok) continue; const list = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data?.data || data?.users || data?.members || data?.list || []); if(Array.isArray(list) && list.length) return list; }catch(e){ console.warn('[users] ьџїВЏљ ьЏёв│┤ API ВІцьїе:', url, e); } } return []; } async function loadSignableUsers(){ let users = []; // ьўёВъг вАюЖиИВЮИ ВѓгВџЕВъљвіћ ьЋГВЃЂ ВъЉВё▒Въљ ьЏёв│┤ВЌљ ьЈгьЋе if(state.currentUser) users.push(state.currentUser); // Ж┤ђвдгВъљ/ВЮ╝в░ўьџїВЏљ вфевЉљ вЈЎВЮ╝ьЋўЖ▓ї ВѕўВІавХђВёю┬иВ░ИВА░вХђВёю ьЏёв│┤вЦ╝ в│┤вЈёвАЮ Ж│хЖ░ю ьџїВЏљ APIвЦ╝ Вџ░Вёа ВѓгВџЕьЋювІц. // Вёюв▓ёВЌљ Ж│хЖ░ю APIЖ░ђ ВъѕВю╝вЕ┤ /api/users/signable вўљвіћ /api/usersЖ░ђ ВѓгВџЕвљўЖ│а, // Ж┤ђвдгВъљ Ж│ёВаЋВЌљВёювіћ ЖИ░ВА┤ /api/admin/usersвЈё вДѕВДђвДЅ fallbackВю╝вАю вЈЎВъЉьЋювІц. try{ const allUsers = await fetchUserListForSelectors(); if(allUsers.length) users = users.concat(allUsers); }catch(e){ console.warn('[sign] ВаёВ▓┤ ьџїВЏљ вфЕвАЮ вАювЊю ВІцьїе:', e); } state.signableUsers = uniqSignUsers(users); state.adminUsers = state.signableUsers; window.signableUsers = state.signableUsers; window.adminUsers = state.adminUsers; if(window.NAMO_SIGN_DEBUG) console.log(`[sign] ВёювфЁ ьЏёв│┤ вАювЊю: ${state.signableUsers.length}вфЁ`); rebuildAllSignGrids(); } async function loadAdminUsers(){ try{ const list = await fetchUserListForSelectors(); state.adminUsers = list || []; state.signableUsers = uniqSignUsers([ ...(state.currentUser ? [state.currentUser] : []), ...state.adminUsers ]); window.signableUsers = state.signableUsers; window.adminUsers = state.adminUsers; renderUserTable(); rebuildAllSignGrids(); }catch(e){ console.warn('[admin] ьџїВЏљ вфЕвАЮ вАювЊю ВІцьїе:', e); } } /* РўЁРўЁРўЁ вѓаВДю KST в│ђьЎў ВаЂВџЕвљю loadIncoming РўЁРўЁРўЁ */ async function loadIncoming(){ const{data}=await api('/api/iqc'); state.incoming=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў/вїђВ▓┤ вѓаВДю ВъљвЈЎ ВЮИВІЮ lot:r.lot, supplier:r.supplier, item:r.item, inspector:r.inspector, incomingQty:r.incoming_qty, checkQty:r.qty, failQty:r.fail, items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:[], signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderIncomingTable(); } /* РўЁРўЁРўЁ вѓаВДю KST в│ђьЎў ВаЂВџЕвљю loadProcess РўЁРўЁРўЁ */ async function loadProcess(){ const{data}=await api('/api/pqc'); state.process=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў/вїђВ▓┤ вѓаВДю ВъљвЈЎ ВЮИВІЮ lot:r.lot, product:r.product, line:r.visual, shift:r.particle, inspector:r.solid, qty:r.qty, failQty:r.fail, judge:r.judge, items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:[], signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderProcessTable(); } /* РўЁРўЁРўЁ вѓаВДю KST в│ђьЎў ВаЂВџЕвљю loadShipment РўЁРўЁРўЁ */ async function loadShipment(){ const{data}=await api('/api/oqc'); state.shipment=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, date:pickRecordDate(r), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў/вїђВ▓┤ вѓаВДю ВъљвЈЎ ВЮИВІЮ // OQC API/DB В╗гвЪ╝вфЁВЮ┤ вІгвЮ╝вЈё вфЕвАЮВЌљ Ж░њВЮ┤ в╣ёВДђ ВЋівЈёвАЮ в│┤ВаЋ customer:r.customer ?? r.customer_name ?? r.customerName ?? r.client ?? r.client_name ?? '', product:r.product ?? r.product_name ?? r.productName ?? r.item ?? r.item_name ?? '', lot:r.lot ?? r.lot_no ?? r.lotNo ?? r.batch_no ?? r.batchNo ?? '', inspector:r.visual ?? r.inspector ?? r.writer ?? '', qty:r.qty ?? r.inspection_qty ?? r.inspectionQty ?? r.check_qty ?? r.checkQty ?? '', failQty:r.fail ?? r.failQty ?? r.fail_qty ?? r.defect_qty ?? r.defectQty ?? 0, judge:r.judge ?? r.final_judge ?? r.finalJudge ?? '', package:r.package ?? r.remark ?? r.remarks ?? r.note ?? '', items:Array.isArray(r.items_json)?r.items_json:(Array.isArray(r.items)?r.items:(Array.isArray(tryJSON(r.items_json))?tryJSON(r.items_json):[])), signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderShipmentTable(); } /* РўЁРўЁРўЁ вѓаВДю KST в│ђьЎў ВаЂВџЕвљю loadNonconform РўЁРўЁРўЁ */ async function loadNonconform(){ const{data}=await api('/api/nonconform'); state.nonconform=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ id:r.id, ncDate:toKSTDate(r.nc_date), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў ncNo:r.nc_no, ncType:r.nc_type, dept:r.dept, lot:r.lot, item:r.item, qty:r.qty, issue:r.issue, cause:r.cause, action:r.action, actionDate:toKSTDate(r.action_date), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў verify:r.verify, verifyDate:toKSTDate(r.verify_date), // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў owner:r.owner, status:r.status, signWriter:tryJSON(r.sign_writer), signReviewer:tryJSON(r.sign_reviewer), signApprover:tryJSON(r.sign_approver) })); renderNcTable(); } async function loadSuppliers(){const{data}=await api('/api/suppliers');state.suppliers=data?.data||[];renderSupplierTable();} /* РўЁРўЁРўЁ вѓаВДю KST в│ђьЎў ВаЂВџЕвљю loadWorklog РўЁРўЁРўЁ */ async function loadWorklog(){ const{data}=await api('/api/worklog'); // worklogвіћ Вёюв▓ёВЌљВёю ЖиИвїђвАю ВЊ░вљў ваївЇћ ВІю toKSTDate ВаЂВџЕ state.worklog=(data?.data||[]).map(r=>({ ...r, workDate: toKSTDate(r.workDate || r.work_date || r.date) // РўЁ KST в│ђьЎў })); renderWorklogTable(); } function defaultInstruments(){ return [ {id:'default-01',no:'NMВИАВаЋ-01',name:'Drying Oven',model:'ThermoStableTM',maker:'DAIHANScientific',location:'ВЌ░ЖхгВєї',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'ВаЋВЃЂ',remark:''}, {id:'default-02',no:'NMВИАВаЋ-02',name:'Vacuum Oven',model:'ThermoStableTM OF-155',maker:'DAIHANScientific',location:'ВЌ░ЖхгВєї',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'ВаЋВЃЂ',remark:''}, {id:'default-03',no:'NMВИАВаЋ-03',name:'ВЮИВъЦВІюьЌўЖИ░',model:'UNITEST-M1',maker:'TEST ONE',location:'ВЌ░ЖхгВєї',cycle:'12',lastCal:'2025-11-10',nextCal:'2026-11-09',status:'ВаЋВЃЂ',remark:''}, {id:'default-04',no:'NMВИАВаЋ-04',name:'ВъЁвЈёвХёВёЮЖИ░',model:'Mastersizer 3000',maker:'Malvern Panalytical',location:'ВЌ░ЖхгВєї',cycle:'12',lastCal:'',nextCal:'',status:'ВаЋВЃЂ',remark:''} ]; } async function migrateLegacyInstrumentsToServerIfNeeded(serverList){ const marker='namo_qms_instruments_migrated_to_server_v1'; if(Array.isArray(serverList)&&serverList.length>0)return false; if(localStorage.getItem(marker)==='1')return false; let legacy=[]; try{legacy=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('namo_qms_instruments')||'[]')||[];}catch(e){legacy=[];} if(!Array.isArray(legacy)||!legacy.length)return false; let migrated=0; for(const x of legacy){ if(!x||!txt(x.no)||!txt(x.name))continue; const p={ no:txt(x.no),name:txt(x.name),model:txt(x.model),maker:txt(x.maker),location:txt(x.location), cycle:txt(x.cycle)||'12',lastCal:txt(x.lastCal||x.last_cal)||null,nextCal:txt(x.nextCal||x.next_cal)||null, status:txt(x.status)||'ВаЋВЃЂ',remark:txt(x.remark),photo:txt(x.photo) }; const {res}=await api('/api/instruments',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); if(res.ok)migrated++; } if(migrated>0){localStorage.setItem(marker,'1');return true;} return false; } async function loadInstruments(){ const {res,data}=await api('/api/instruments'); if(res.ok&&data?.success){ let rows=data.data||[]; const migrated=await migrateLegacyInstrumentsToServerIfNeeded(rows); if(migrated){ const again=await api('/api/instruments'); rows=again.data?.data||rows; } state.instruments=(rows||[]).map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); if(!state.instruments.length){ // DBВЎђ ЖИ░ВА┤ вИївЮ╝Вџ░Вађ ВађВъЦВєїЖ░ђ вфевЉљ в╣ёВќ┤ ВъѕВЮё вЋївДї ЖИ░в│И ВИАВаЋЖИ░вЦ╝ ьЎћвЕ┤ВЌљ ьЉюВІюьЋЕвІѕвІц. state.instruments=defaultInstruments().map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); } }else{ const raw=localStorage.getItem('namo_qms_instruments'); let list=[]; try{list=raw?JSON.parse(raw):[];}catch(e){list=[];} if(!Array.isArray(list)||list.length===0){ list=defaultInstruments(); try{localStorage.setItem('namo_qms_instruments',JSON.stringify(list));}catch(e){} } state.instruments=list.map(x=>({...x,status:instrumentAutoStatus(x.nextCal,x.status)})); } renderInstrumentTable(); } function saveInstrumentsLocal(){ try{localStorage.setItem('namo_qms_instruments',JSON.stringify(state.instruments));}catch(e){} } async function loadAllвЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░(){ await loadSignableUsers(); await Promise.all([loadIncoming(),loadProcess(),loadShipment(),loadSuppliers(),loadWorklog(),loadNonconform(),loadInstruments(),loadTrainingReports()]); loadSpcReports(); if(state.currentUser?.role==='admin')await loadAdminUsers(); renderSummary();setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof renderSummary==='function')renderSummary();},250);populateReportSelect();loadStandaloneReport(); if(typeof renderTrainingTable==='function')renderTrainingTable(); if(typeof renderTrainingPreview==='function')renderTrainingPreview(); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ RENDER TABLES РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function renderIncomingTable(){ const tb=$('incomingTable');if(!state.incoming.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(12);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.incoming.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.lot||'')}${esc(r.supplier||'')}${esc(r.item||'')}${r.incomingQty??''}${r.checkQty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderProcessTable(){ const tb=$('processTable');if(!state.process.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(11);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.process.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.lot||'')}${esc(r.product||'')}${esc(r.line||'')}${r.qty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderShipmentTable(){ const tb=$('shipmentTable');if(!state.shipment.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(11);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.shipment.map(r=>`${r.date||''}${esc(r.customer||'')}${esc(r.product||'')}${esc(r.lot||'')}${r.qty??''}${r.failQty??''}${jBadge(calcJ(r.items||[]))}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function ncStatusBadge(s){const cls=s==='ВЎёЖ▓░'?'closed':s==='В▓ўвдгВцЉ'?'progress':'open';return`${esc(s||'в»ИЖ▓░')}`;} function renderNcTable(){ const tb=$('nonconformTable');if(!state.nonconform.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(13);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.nonconform.map(r=>`${r.ncDate||''}${esc(r.ncNo||'-')}${esc(r.ncType||'-')}${esc(r.dept||'-')}${esc(r.lot||'-')}${esc(r.item||'-')}${r.qty??0}${esc(r.owner||'-')}${ncStatusBadge(r.status)}${esc(r.signWriter?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signReviewer?.name||'-')}${esc(r.signApprover?.name||'-')}
`).join(''); } function renderSupplierTable(){ const tb=$('supplierTable');if(!state.suppliers.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(6);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.suppliers.map(r=>`${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.manager||'')}${esc(r.phone||'')}${esc(r.category||'')}${esc(r.status||'')}
`).join(''); } function instrumentBadge(s){ const cls=s==='ВаЋВЃЂ'?'pass':s==='ЖхљВаЋВўѕВаЋ'?'hold':s==='ЖхљВаЋВ┤ѕЖ│╝'?'fail':'info'; return `${esc(s||'ВаЋВЃЂ')}`; } function instrumentPhotoSrc(r){ return r?.photo || r?.photoUrl || r?.image || r?.imageUrl || ''; } function renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(){ const src=$('instrumentPhoto')?.value?.trim()||''; const wrap=$('instrumentPhotoPreview'),img=$('instrumentPhotoPreviewImg'); if(!wrap||!img)return; if(src){img.src=src;wrap.style.display='inline-block';} else{img.removeAttribute('src');wrap.style.display='none';} } function handleInstrumentPhotoFile(e){ const file=e?.target?.files?.[0]; if(!file)return; if(!file.type.startsWith('image/')){alert('ВЮ┤в»ИВДђ ьїїВЮ╝вДї ВёаьЃЮьЋа Вѕў ВъѕВіхвІѕвІц.');e.target.value='';return;} const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=()=>{if($('instrumentPhoto'))$('instrumentPhoto').value=reader.result;renderInstrumentPhotoPreview();}; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function viewInstrumentPhoto(id){ const r=state.instruments.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id)); if(!r)return; const src=instrumentPhotoSrc(r); if(!src){alert('вЊ▒вАЮвљю ВИАВаЋЖИ░ ВѓгВДёВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц.');return;} if($('instrumentPhotoModalTitle'))$('instrumentPhotoModalTitle').textContent=`${r.name||'ВИАВаЋЖИ░'} ВѓгВДё`; if($('instrumentPhotoModalImg'))$('instrumentPhotoModalImg').src=src; if($('instrumentPhotoModalMeta'))$('instrumentPhotoModalMeta').innerHTML=`${esc(r.name||'-')} (${esc(r.no||'-')})
вфевЇИвфЁ: ${esc(r.model||'-')}
ВаюВА░Вѓг: ${esc(r.maker||'-')}
ВёцВ╣ўВъЦВєї: ${esc(r.location||'-')}`; if($('instrumentPhotoModal'))$('instrumentPhotoModal').classList.add('show'); } function closeInstrumentPhotoModal(){ if($('instrumentPhotoModal'))$('instrumentPhotoModal').classList.remove('show'); if($('instrumentPhotoModalImg'))$('instrumentPhotoModalImg').removeAttribute('src'); } function renderInstrumentTable(){ const tb=$('instrumentTable');if(!tb)return; if(!state.instruments.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(12);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.instruments.map(r=>{ const photo=instrumentPhotoSrc(r); const photoCell=photo?``:`-`; return `${esc(r.no||'')}${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.model||'')}${esc(r.maker||'')}${esc(r.location||'')}${esc(r.cycle||'')}Ж░юВЏћ${esc(r.lastCal||'-')}${esc(r.nextCal||'-')}${instrumentBadge(instrumentAutoStatus(r.nextCal,r.status))}${esc(r.remark||'')}${photoCell}
`; }).join(''); } function renderWorklogTable(){ const tb=$('worklogTable');if(!tb)return;if(!state.worklog.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(8);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.worklog.map(r=>{ const lot=(r.finishedLot||'').toLowerCase(); const iq=state.incoming.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const pq=state.process.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const oq=state.shipment.filter(x=>(x.lot||'').toLowerCase()===lot).length; const lk=[iq?`IQC ${iq}`:'',pq?`PQC ${pq}`:'',oq?`OQC ${oq}`:''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')||`ВЌєВЮї`; return`${r.workDate||''}${esc(r.finishedLot||'')}${esc(r.worker||'')}${esc(r.planQty||'')}${esc(r.prodQty||'')}${esc(r.failQty||'')}${lk}
`; }).join(''); } function renderUserTable(){ const tb=$('userTable');if(!state.adminUsers.length){tb.innerHTML=eRow(8);return;} tb.innerHTML=state.adminUsers.map(r=>`${esc(r.name||'')}${esc(r.email||'')}${esc(r.department||'')}${esc(r.title||'-')}${isSenior(r)?'Ж▓ђьєа/Ві╣ВЮИ Ж░ђвіЦ':''}${r.role==='admin'?'Ж┤ђвдгВъљ':'ВЮ╝в░ўьџїВЏљ'}${r.status||''}${toKSTDate(String(r.created_at||'').slice(0,10)||r.created_at)}
`).join(''); } /* ьєхьЋЕ Ж┤ђВаю вЈёвёЏ KPI: ьўёВъг вЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░/ВА░ьџїВЌ░вЈё ЖИ░Вцђ ВЌ░вЈЎ */ function num(v){const n=Number(v);return isFinite(n)?n:0;} function sumFail(arr){return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).reduce((a,r)=>a+num(r.failQty??r.fail_qty??r.fail??r.ngQty??0),0);} function byLotSet(arr){return new Set((Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).map(r=>String(r.lot||r.finishedLot||r.ncLot||'').trim()).filter(Boolean));} function cntStatus(arr,match){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>match(String(r.status||r.state||r.result||'').trim(),r)).length; } function setBreak(key,name,val){document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-break="${key}:${name}"]`).forEach(el=>el.textContent=`${Number(val)||0}Ж▒┤`);} function setDonutSegments(key,total,parts){ const donut=document.querySelector(`[data-qmes-donut="${key}"]`); if(!donut)return; const vals=parts.map(v=>Math.max(0,Number(v)||0)); let denom=vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); if(denom<=0) denom=Math.max(1,Number(total)||0); let acc=0; const ps=vals.map(v=>{acc+=denom?Math.round(v/denom*100):0;return Math.min(100,acc);}); if(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)<=0 && Number(total)>0){ps[0]=100;ps[1]=100;ps[2]=100;ps[3]=100;} donut.style.setProperty('--p1',(ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p2',(ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p3',(ps[2]||ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); donut.style.setProperty('--p4',(ps[3]||ps[2]||ps[1]||ps[0]||0)+'%'); } function isTrainingDone(r){ const raw=[r?.status,r?.approvalStatus,r?.approval_status,r?.state,r?.result,r?.signStatus,r?.sign_status].map(v=>String(v||'')).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const signApprover = r?.signApprover || r?.sign_approver || r?.approver || {}; const signReviewer = r?.signReviewer || r?.sign_reviewer || r?.reviewer || {}; const approvedBy = r?.approvedBy || r?.approved_by || ''; const approvedAt = r?.approvedAt || r?.approved_at || ''; if(/в░ўвац|reject|ВиеВєї|cancel/.test(raw)) return false; if(/ВЎёвБї|Ві╣ВЮИ|approved|complete|done|closed/.test(raw)) return true; if(approvedBy || approvedAt) return true; if(signApprover && (signApprover.name || signApprover.email || signApprover.date || signApprover.signedAt)) return true; if(signReviewer && signApprover && (signReviewer.name || signReviewer.email) && (signApprover.name || signApprover.email)) return true; return false; } function isTrainingProgress(r){ const raw=[r?.status,r?.approvalStatus,r?.approval_status,r?.state,r?.result].map(v=>String(v||'')).join(' ').toLowerCase(); if(isTrainingDone(r)) return false; return /ВДёьќЅ|Ж▓ђьєа|ВЃЂВІа|Ж▓░Въг|review|progress|pending/.test(raw); } function updateTrendKpis(inRows,prRows,shRows){ // ВЏћв│ё Ж▓ђВѓг ьўёьЎЕ ВХћВЮ┤віћ ВѕўВъЁЖ▓ђВѓг(IQC), Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг(PQC), ВХюьЋўЖ▓ђВѓг(OQC)вДї ВДЉЖ│ёьЋЕвІѕвІц. const total=(inRows?.length||0)+(prRows?.length||0)+(shRows?.length||0); const fail=[...(inRows||[]),...(prRows||[]),...(shRows||[])].reduce((a,r)=>a+num(r.failQty??r.fail_qty??r.fail??r.ngQty??0),0); const passRate=total?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,((total-fail)/total*100))).toFixed(1):'0.0'; const totalEl=document.getElementById('trendTotalCount'); const passEl=document.getElementById('trendPassRate'); if(totalEl) totalEl.textContent=`${total}Ж▒┤`; if(passEl) passEl.textContent=`${passRate}%`; } function updateQmesDonuts(vals){ const s=(typeof state==='object'&&state)?state:{}; const y=Number((document.getElementById('dashYear')&&document.getElementById('dashYear').value)||new Date().getFullYear()); const inRows=(Array.isArray(s.incoming)?s.incoming:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const prRows=(Array.isArray(s.process)?s.process:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const shRows=(Array.isArray(s.shipment)?s.shipment:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const ncRows=(Array.isArray(s.nonconform)?s.nonconform:[]); const trRows=(Array.isArray(s.trainingReports)?s.trainingReports:(Array.isArray(s.training)?s.training:[])).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y))); const numbers={ incoming:Number(vals?.incoming ?? inRows.length ?? 0), process:Number(vals?.process ?? prRows.length ?? 0), shipment:Number(vals?.shipment ?? shRows.length ?? 0), nonconform:Number(vals?.nonconform ?? ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.status||'в»ИЖ▓░')!=='ВЎёЖ▓░').length ?? 0), training:Number(vals?.training ?? trRows.length ?? 0) }; const labels={ incoming:`ВаёВ▓┤ ${numbers.incoming}Ж▒┤`, process:`ВаёВ▓┤ ${numbers.process}Ж▒┤`, shipment:`ВаёВ▓┤ ${numbers.shipment}Ж▒┤`, nonconform:`в»ИЖ▓░ ${numbers.nonconform}Ж▒┤`, training:`ВаёВ▓┤ ${numbers.training}Ж▒┤` }; const lotIncoming=byLotSet(inRows), lotProcess=byLotSet(prRows), lotShipment=byLotSet(shRows); const ncIncoming=ncRows.filter(r=>lotIncoming.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncProcess=ncRows.filter(r=>lotProcess.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncShipment=ncRows.filter(r=>lotShipment.has(String(r.ncLot||r.lot||'').trim())).length; const ncOpen=ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.status||'в»ИЖ▓░')!=='ВЎёЖ▓░').length; const ncCapa=ncRows.filter(r=>String(r.action||r.capa||r.actionPlan||r.correctiveAction||'').trim()).length; const trDone=trRows.filter(isTrainingDone).length; const trProgress=trRows.filter(isTrainingProgress).length; const trOpen=Math.max(0,trRows.length-trDone-trProgress); const data={ incoming:{fail:sumFail(inRows),ncr:ncIncoming,hold:inRows.filter(r=>String(safeCalcJ(r.items||[])||r.judge||'').includes('в│┤вЦў')).length,capa:ncCapa}, process:{fail:sumFail(prRows),ncr:ncProcess,repeat:0,capa:ncCapa}, shipment:{fail:sumFail(shRows),ncr:ncShipment,repeat:0,capa:ncCapa}, nonconform:{ncr:ncRows.length,capa:ncCapa,open:ncOpen}, training:{done:trDone,progress:trProgress,open:trOpen} }; Object.entries(numbers).forEach(([key,val])=>{ document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-count="${key}"]`).forEach(el=>{el.textContent=val;}); document.querySelectorAll(`[data-qmes-note="${key}"]`).forEach(el=>{el.textContent=labels[key]||`ВаёВ▓┤ ${val}Ж▒┤`;}); }); Object.entries(data).forEach(([key,obj])=>{ Object.entries(obj).forEach(([k,v])=>setBreak(key,k,v)); setDonutSegments(key,numbers[key],Object.values(obj)); }); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ DASHBOARD РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function setTextSafe(id,val){ const el=$(id); if(el) el.textContent=val; } function setTrendSafe(id,c,pp){ const el=$(id); if(!el) return; const s=(!pp)?(c?'ВІаЖию':'-'):(((Math.round((c-pp)/pp*100))>=0?'+':'')+Math.round((c-pp)/pp*100)+'%'); el.textContent=s; el.className='trend '+(s.startsWith('+')?'up':s.startsWith('-')?'down':'neutral'); } function recordDateOf(r){ const picked=pickRecordDate(r); if(picked) return picked; const raw=String(r?.date||r?.workDate||r?.work_date||r?.inspectionDate||r?.inspection_date||r?.createdAt||r?.created_at||r?.ncDate||r?.nc_date||r?.trainingDate||r?.training_date||r?.reportDate||r?.report_date||'').trim(); if(!raw) return ''; const m=raw.match(/(\d{4})[-./вЁё\s]*(\d{1,2})?[-./ВЏћ\s]*(\d{1,2})?/); if(!m) return raw; const yy=m[1], mm=String(m[2]||'01').padStart(2,'0'), dd=String(m[3]||'01').padStart(2,'0'); return `${yy}-${mm}-${dd}`; } function countByYear(arr,yr){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(yr))).length; } function qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr){ return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(yr))); } function qmesMonthIndex(r){ const d=recordDateOf(r); const m=d.match(/^\d{4}-(\d{2})/); return m?Number(m[1])-1:-1; } function qmesCountForYearMonth(arr,yr,mi){ return qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr).filter(r=>qmesMonthIndex(r)===mi).length; } function qmesCountForQuarter(arr,yr,qi){ return qmesRowsByYear(arr,yr).filter(r=>{ const mi=qmesMonthIndex(r); return mi>=qi*3 && miString(r.status||'в»ИЖ▓░')!=='ВЎёЖ▓░').length; setTextSafe('sumIncoming',iC);setTextSafe('sumProcess',pC);setTextSafe('sumShipment',sC);setTextSafe('sumWorklog',wC);setTextSafe('sumNc',ncOpen); setTrendSafe('sumIncomingRate',iC,iP);setTrendSafe('sumProcessRate',pC,pP);setTrendSafe('sumShipmentRate',sC,sP);setTrendSafe('sumWorklogRate',wC,wP); if(typeof updateQmesDonuts==='function') updateQmesDonuts({incoming:iC,process:pC,shipment:sC,nonconform:ncOpen,training:tC}); renderCharts(); } function renderCharts(){ const canvas=$('trendChart'); if(!canvas || !window.Chart) return; let y=Number(($('dashYear')&&$('dashYear').value)||new Date().getFullYear()); const allTrendRows=[...(Array.isArray(state.incoming)?state.incoming:[]),...(Array.isArray(state.process)?state.process:[]),...(Array.isArray(state.shipment)?state.shipment:[])]; const availableYears=[...new Set(allTrendRows.map(r=>recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4)).filter(v=>/^\d{4}$/.test(v)))].map(Number).sort((a,b)=>b-a); if(availableYears.length && !allTrendRows.some(r=>recordDateOf(r).startsWith(String(y)))) y=availableYears[0]; const mode=window.qmesTrendMode||'month'; const makeGradient=(ctx,color)=>{ const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,320); if(color==='blue'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(37,99,235,.30)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(37,99,235,.02)');} if(color==='purple'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(139,92,246,.25)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(139,92,246,.02)');} if(color==='orange'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(249,115,22,.25)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(249,115,22,.02)');} if(color==='green'){g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(16,185,129,.24)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(16,185,129,.02)');} return g; }; let labels=[], incoming=[], process=[], shipment=[], titleSuffix='ВЏћЖ░ё'; if(mode==='quarter'){ labels=['1вХёЖИ░','2вХёЖИ░','3вХёЖИ░','4вХёЖИ░']; incoming=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.incoming,y,i)); process=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.process,y,i)); shipment=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForQuarter(state.shipment,y,i)); titleSuffix='вХёЖИ░'; }else if(mode==='year'){ labels=Array.from({length:5},(_,i)=>String(y-4+i)); incoming=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.incoming,yy)); process=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.process,yy)); shipment=labels.map(yy=>countByYear(state.shipment,yy)); titleSuffix='ВЌ░Ж░ё'; }else{ labels=['1ВЏћ','2ВЏћ','3ВЏћ','4ВЏћ','5ВЏћ','6ВЏћ','7ВЏћ','8ВЏћ','9ВЏћ','10ВЏћ','11ВЏћ','12ВЏћ']; incoming=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.incoming,y,i)); process=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.process,y,i)); shipment=labels.map((_,i)=>qmesCountForYearMonth(state.shipment,y,i)); titleSuffix='ВЏћЖ░ё'; } const inRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.incoming)?state.incoming:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.incoming,y); const prRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.process)?state.process:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.process,y); const shRows=mode==='year' ? (Array.isArray(state.shipment)?state.shipment:[]).filter(r=>labels.includes(recordDateOf(r).slice(0,4))) : qmesRowsByYear(state.shipment,y); updateTrendKpis(inRows,prRows,shRows); const tag=document.querySelector('#qmesTrendSlot .qmes-trend-wide .tag'); if(tag) tag.textContent=titleSuffix.toUpperCase(); const unit=document.getElementById('trendUnitText'); if(unit) unit.textContent=mode==='year'?'(ВхюЖи╝ 5вЁё / вІеВюё: Ж▒┤)':'(вІеВюё: Ж▒┤)'; document.querySelectorAll('[data-trend-mode]').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',(b.dataset.trendMode||'month')===mode)); safeDestroyChart('trendChart'); const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); const maxVal=Math.max(1,...incoming,...process,...shipment); const pointLabelPlugin={ id:'qmesPointLabel', afterDatasetsDraw(chart){ const {ctx}=chart; ctx.save(); ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.textBaseline='bottom'; ctx.font='700 11px Inter, sans-serif'; chart.data.datasets.forEach((ds,di)=>{ const meta=chart.getDatasetMeta(di); meta.data.forEach((pt,i)=>{ const val=Number(ds.data[i]||0); if(!val) return; ctx.fillStyle=ds.borderColor; ctx.fillText(String(val),pt.x,pt.y-7-(di*2)); }); }); ctx.restore(); } }; state.charts.trend=new Chart(canvas,{ type:'line', data:{ labels, datasets:[ {label:'ВѕўВъЁЖ▓ђВѓг (IQC)',data:incoming,borderColor:'#2563eb',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'blue'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5}, {label:'Ж│хВаЋЖ▓ђВѓг (PQC)',data:process,borderColor:'#8b5cf6',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'purple'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5}, {label:'ВХюьЋўЖ▓ђВѓг (OQC)',data:shipment,borderColor:'#f97316',backgroundColor:makeGradient(ctx,'orange'),fill:true,tension:.34,borderWidth:2.7,pointRadius:4.2,pointHoverRadius:6,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2.5} ] }, plugins:[pointLabelPlugin], options:{ responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false}, plugins:{ legend:{position:'top',align:'center',labels:{font:{size:12,weight:'800'},boxWidth:10,boxHeight:10,usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'rectRounded',padding:18}}, tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(15,23,42,.92)',padding:12,titleFont:{weight:'900'},bodyFont:{weight:'800'},callbacks:{label:(ctx)=>`${ctx.dataset.label}: ${ctx.parsed.y}Ж▒┤`}} }, scales:{ y:{beginAtZero:true,suggestedMax:maxVal+1,ticks:{precision:0,stepSize:1,font:{size:11,weight:'800'},color:'#64748b'},grid:{color:'rgba(15,23,42,.07)',drawBorder:false}}, x:{offset:false,ticks:{font:{size:11,weight:'800'},color:'#64748b'},grid:{display:false}} } } }); window.__chartStore['trendChart']=state.charts.trend; setTimeout(()=>{try{state.charts.trend.resize();}catch(e){}},80); } function calcInstrumentNext(){ const last=$('instrumentLastCal')?.value||''; const cycle=$('instrumentCycle')?.value||''; if(last&&cycle&&$('instrumentNextCal')){ $('instrumentNextCal').value=addMonthsToDate(last,cycle); } updateInstrumentStatusByDate(); } function updateInstrumentStatusByDate(){ const next=$('instrumentNextCal')?.value||''; const cur=$('instrumentStatus')?.value||'ВаЋВЃЂ'; const auto=instrumentAutoStatus(next,cur); if($('instrumentStatus'))$('instrumentStatus').value=auto; } async function saveInstrument(){ const id=$('instrumentEditId').value||''; const p={ id, name:$('instrumentName').value.trim(), no:$('instrumentNo').value.trim(), model:$('instrumentModel').value.trim(), maker:$('instrumentMaker').value.trim(), location:$('instrumentLocation').value.trim(), cycle:$('instrumentCycle').value.trim()||'12', lastCal:$('instrumentLastCal').value, nextCal:$('instrumentNextCal').value, status:instrumentAutoStatus($('instrumentNextCal').value,$('instrumentStatus').value), remark:$('instrumentRemark').value.trim(), photo:$('instrumentPhoto')?.value.trim()||'' }; if(!p.name||!p.no){alert('ВИАВаЋЖИ░вфЁЖ│╝ Ж┤ђвдгв▓ѕьўИвіћ ьЋёВѕўВъЁвІѕвІц.');return;} const isExisting=!!id&&state.instruments.some(x=>String(x.id)===String(id)); const {res,data}=await api(isExisting?`/api/instruments/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`:'/api/instruments',{ method:isExisting?'PUT':'POST', body:JSON.stringify(p) }); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){alert(data?.message||'ВИАВаЋЖИ░ ВађВъЦВЌљ ВІцьїеьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.');return;} await loadInstruments();clearInstrument();alert('ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.'); } function clearInstrument(){ ['instrumentEditId','instrumentName','instrumentNo','instrumentModel','instrumentMaker','instrumentLocation','instrumentLastCal','instrumentNextCal','instrumentPhoto','instrumentRemark'].forEach(id=>{if($(id))$(id).value='';}); if($('instrumentPhotoFile'))$('instrumentPhotoFile').value=''; renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(); if($('instrumentCycle'))$('instrumentCycle').value='12'; if($('instrumentStatus'))$('instrumentStatus').value='ВаЋВЃЂ'; } function editInstrument(id){ const r=state.instruments.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return; $('instrumentEditId').value=r.id;$('instrumentName').value=r.name||'';$('instrumentNo').value=r.no||'';$('instrumentModel').value=r.model||'';$('instrumentMaker').value=r.maker||'';$('instrumentLocation').value=r.location||'';$('instrumentCycle').value=r.cycle||'12';$('instrumentLastCal').value=r.lastCal||'';$('instrumentNextCal').value=r.nextCal||'';$('instrumentStatus').value=instrumentAutoStatus(r.nextCal,r.status);if($('instrumentPhoto'))$('instrumentPhoto').value=instrumentPhotoSrc(r);$('instrumentRemark').value=r.remark||'';renderInstrumentPhotoPreview(); } async function deleteInstrument(id){ if(!confirm('ВѓГВаюьЋўВІюЖ▓аВіхвІѕЖ╣ї?'))return; const {res,data}=await api(`/api/instruments/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`,{method:'DELETE'}); if(!res.ok||!data?.success){alert(data?.message||'ВѓГВаюВЌљ ВІцьїеьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.');return;} await loadInstruments(); } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ SAVE РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ async function saveIqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('iqc'); const p={date:$('incomingDate').value,lot:$('incomingLot').value.trim(),supplier:$('incomingSupplier').value.trim(),item:$('incomingItem').value.trim(),inspector:sp.writer.name,incomingQty:$('incomingQty').value,checkQty:$('incomingCheckQty').value,failQty:$('incomingFailQty').value,items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.incomingItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('incomingEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/iqc/${id}`:'/api/iqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearIqc();await loadIncoming();renderSummary();} } async function savePqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('pqc'); const p={date:$('processDate').value,lot:$('processLot').value.trim(),product:$('processProduct').value.trim(),visual:$('processLine').value.trim(),solid:sp.writer.name,particle:$('processShift').value.trim(),qty:$('processQty').value,failQty:$('processFailQty').value,items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.processItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('processEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/pqc/${id}`:'/api/pqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearPqc();await loadProcess();renderSummary();} } async function saveOqc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('oqc'); const oqcCustomer=$('shipmentCustomer').value.trim(), oqcProduct=$('shipmentProduct').value.trim(), oqcLot=$('shipmentLot').value.trim(), oqcQty=$('shipmentQty').value, oqcFail=$('shipmentFailQty').value, oqcRemark=$('shipmentRemark').value.trim(); const missing=[]; if(!oqcCustomer)missing.push('Ж│аЖ░ЮВѓг'); if(!oqcProduct)missing.push('ВаюьњѕвфЁ'); if(!oqcLot)missing.push('LOT'); if(!oqcQty || Number(oqcQty)<=0)missing.push('Ж▓ђВѓгВѕўвЪЅ'); if(missing.length){alert('ВХюьЋўЖ▓ђВѓг ВађВъЦ вХѕЖ░ђ: '+missing.join(', ')+' ьЋГвфЕВЮё ВъЁваЦьЋўВёИВџћ.');return;} // Вёюв▓ё/DB В╗гвЪ╝вфЁВЮ┤ camelCase, snake_case, ЖИ░ВА┤ fail В╗гвЪ╝ ВцЉ вг┤ВЌЄВЮ┤вЊа в░ЏВЋёвЈё ВађВъЦвљўвЈёвАЮ в│ёВ╣ГВЮё ьЋеЖ╗ў ВаёВєА const p={date:$('shipmentDate').value,customer:oqcCustomer,customerName:oqcCustomer,customer_name:oqcCustomer,client:oqcCustomer,client_name:oqcCustomer,product:oqcProduct,productName:oqcProduct,product_name:oqcProduct,item:oqcProduct,item_name:oqcProduct,lot:oqcLot,lotNo:oqcLot,lot_no:oqcLot,batchNo:oqcLot,batch_no:oqcLot,visual:sp.writer.name,inspector:sp.writer.name,writer:sp.writer.name,qty:oqcQty,inspectionQty:oqcQty,inspection_qty:oqcQty,checkQty:oqcQty,check_qty:oqcQty,failQty:oqcFail,fail:oqcFail,fail_qty:oqcFail,defectQty:oqcFail,defect_qty:oqcFail,package:oqcRemark,remark:oqcRemark,items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.shipmentItemDrafts)),signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('shipmentEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/oqc/${id}`:'/api/oqc',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearOqc();await loadShipment();renderSummary();} } async function saveNc(){ const sp=getSignPayload('nc'); const p={ncDate:$('ncDate').value,ncNo:$('ncNo').value.trim(),ncType:$('ncType').value,dept:$('ncDept').value.trim(),lot:$('ncLot').value.trim(),item:$('ncItem').value.trim(),qty:$('ncQty').value,issue:$('ncIssue').value.trim(),cause:$('ncCause').value.trim(),action:$('ncAction').value.trim(),actionDate:$('ncActionDate').value||null,verify:$('ncVerify').value.trim(),verifyDate:$('ncVerifyDate').value||null,owner:$('ncOwner').value.trim(),status:$('ncStatus').value,signWriter:sp.writer,signReviewer:sp.reviewer,signApprover:sp.approver}; const id=$('ncEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/nonconform/${id}`:'/api/nonconform',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearNc();await loadNonconform();renderSummary();} } async function saveSupplier(){ const p={name:$('supplierName').value.trim(),manager:$('supplierManager').value.trim(),phone:$('supplierPhone').value.trim(),category:$('supplierCategory').value.trim(),status:$('supplierStatus').value.trim()}; const id=$('supplierEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/suppliers/${id}`:'/api/suppliers',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearSupplier();await loadSuppliers();} } async function saveWorklog(){ const p={workDate:$('worklogDate').value,finishedLot:$('worklogFinishedLot').value.trim(),worker:$('worklogWorker').value.trim(),planQty:$('worklogPlanQty').value.trim(),prodQty:$('worklogProdQty').value.trim(),failQty:$('worklogFailQty').value.trim(),remark:$('worklogRemark').value.trim(),flowSet:$('worklogFlowSet').value.trim(),flowActual:$('worklogFlowActual').value.trim(),tempSet:$('worklogTempSet').value.trim(),tempActual:$('worklogTempActual').value.trim(),pressSet:$('worklogPressSet').value.trim(),pressActual:$('worklogPressActual').value.trim(),materials:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.worklogMaterialDrafts))}; const id=$('worklogEditId').value; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/worklog/${id}`:'/api/worklog',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success){clearWorklog();await loadWorklog();renderSummary();if($('page-trace')?.classList.contains('active'))searchTrace();} } async function saveUser(){ const id=$('userEditId').value; const p={name:$('userName').value.trim(),email:$('userEmail').value.trim(),department:$('userDepartment').value.trim(),title:$('userTitle').value.trim(),role:$('userRole').value,status:$('userStatus').value,password:$('userPassword').value.trim()}; const{data}=await api(id?`/api/admin/users/${id}`:'/api/admin/users',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',body:JSON.stringify(p)}); alert(data?.message||'ВађВъЦвљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.'); if(data?.success){clearUser();await loadAdminUsers();await loadSignableUsers();} } /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ CLEAR РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function clearIqc(){['incomingEditId','incomingLot','incomingSupplier','incomingItem','incomingQty','incomingCheckQty','incomingFailQty'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('incomingDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('iqc');state.incomingItemDrafts=defIqc();renderIqcItems();} function clearPqc(){['processEditId','processLot','processLine','processShift','processProduct','processQty','processFailQty'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('processDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('pqc');state.processItemDrafts=defPqc();renderPqcItems();} function clearOqc(){['shipmentEditId','shipmentCustomer','shipmentProduct','shipmentLot','shipmentQty','shipmentFailQty','shipmentRemark'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('shipmentDate').value=todayKST();clearSign('oqc');state.shipmentItemDrafts=defOqc();renderOqcItems();} function clearNc(){['ncEditId','ncNo','ncDept','ncLot','ncItem','ncQty','ncIssue','ncCause','ncAction','ncActionDate','ncVerify','ncVerifyDate','ncOwner'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('ncDate').value=todayKST();$('ncType').value='';$('ncStatus').value='в»ИЖ▓░';clearSign('nc');} function clearSupplier(){['supplierEditId','supplierName','supplierManager','supplierPhone','supplierCategory','supplierStatus'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');} function clearWorklog(){['worklogEditId','worklogFinishedLot','worklogWorker','worklogPlanQty','worklogProdQty','worklogFailQty','worklogRemark','worklogFlowSet','worklogFlowActual','worklogTempSet','worklogTempActual','worklogPressSet','worklogPressActual'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('worklogDate').value=todayKST();state.worklogMaterialDrafts=[];renderWorklogMats();$('worklogLinkBox').style.display='none';} function clearUser(){['userEditId','userName','userEmail','userDepartment','userTitle','userPassword'].forEach(id=>$(id).value='');$('userRole').value='user';$('userStatus').value='APPROVED';} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ EDIT РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function editIncoming(id){const r=state.incoming.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('incomingEditId').value=r.id;$('incomingDate').value=r.date||'';$('incomingLot').value=r.lot||'';$('incomingSupplier').value=r.supplier||'';$('incomingItem').value=r.item||'';$('incomingQty').value=r.incomingQty||'';$('incomingCheckQty').value=r.checkQty||'';$('incomingFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';state.incomingItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defIqc();renderIqcItems();restoreSign('iqc',r);} function editProcess(id){const r=state.process.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('processEditId').value=r.id;$('processDate').value=r.date||'';$('processLot').value=r.lot||'';$('processLine').value=r.line||'';$('processShift').value=r.shift||'';$('processProduct').value=r.product||'';$('processQty').value=r.qty||'';$('processFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';state.processItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defPqc();renderPqcItems();restoreSign('pqc',r);} function editShipment(id){const r=state.shipment.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('shipmentEditId').value=r.id;$('shipmentDate').value=r.date||'';$('shipmentCustomer').value=r.customer||'';$('shipmentProduct').value=r.product||'';$('shipmentLot').value=r.lot||'';$('shipmentQty').value=r.qty||'';$('shipmentFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';$('shipmentRemark').value=r.package||'';state.shipmentItemDrafts=r.items?.length?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.items)):defOqc();renderOqcItems();restoreSign('oqc',r);} function editNc(id){ const r=state.nonconform.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return; $('ncEditId').value=r.id;$('ncDate').value=r.ncDate||'';$('ncNo').value=r.ncNo||'';$('ncType').value=r.ncType||'';$('ncDept').value=r.dept||'';$('ncLot').value=r.lot||'';$('ncItem').value=r.item||'';$('ncQty').value=r.qty||0;$('ncIssue').value=r.issue||'';$('ncCause').value=r.cause||'';$('ncAction').value=r.action||'';$('ncActionDate').value=r.actionDate||'';$('ncVerify').value=r.verify||'';$('ncVerifyDate').value=r.verifyDate||'';$('ncOwner').value=r.owner||'';$('ncStatus').value=r.status||'в»ИЖ▓░'; restoreSign('nc',r); $$('.nav-item[data-page]').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-page="nonconform"]')?.classList.add('active'); $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));$('page-nonconform').classList.add('active'); } function editSupplier(id){const r=state.suppliers.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('supplierEditId').value=r.id;$('supplierName').value=r.name||'';$('supplierManager').value=r.manager||'';$('supplierPhone').value=r.phone||'';$('supplierCategory').value=r.category||'';$('supplierStatus').value=r.status||'';} function editWorklog(id){const r=state.worklog.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('worklogEditId').value=r.id;$('worklogDate').value=r.workDate||'';$('worklogFinishedLot').value=r.finishedLot||'';$('worklogWorker').value=r.worker||'';$('worklogPlanQty').value=r.planQty||'';$('worklogProdQty').value=r.prodQty||'';$('worklogFailQty').value=r.failQty||'';$('worklogRemark').value=r.remark||'';$('worklogFlowSet').value=r.flowSet||'';$('worklogFlowActual').value=r.flowActual||'';$('worklogTempSet').value=r.tempSet||'';$('worklogTempActual').value=r.tempActual||'';$('worklogPressSet').value=r.pressSet||'';$('worklogPressActual').value=r.pressActual||'';state.worklogMaterialDrafts=Array.isArray(r.materials)?JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r.materials)):[];renderWorklogMats();updateWorklogLinkage();} function editUser(id){const r=state.adminUsers.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));if(!r)return;$('userEditId').value=r.id;$('userName').value=r.name||'';$('userEmail').value=r.email||'';$('userDepartment').value=r.department||'';$('userTitle').value=r.title||'';$('userRole').value=r.role||'user';$('userStatus').value=r.status||'APPROVED';$('userPassword').value='';} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ DELETE РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ async function delApi(url,msg,reload){if(!confirm(msg))return;const{data}=await api(url,{method:'DELETE'});alert(data?.message||'ВѓГВаювљўВЌѕВіхвІѕвІц.');if(data?.success)await reload();} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ WORKLOG MATERIALS РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ function renderWorklogMats(){ const tb=$('worklogMaterialsTable'); if(!tb)return; if(!state.worklogMaterialDrafts.length){tb.innerHTML=`ВЏљвБї ьќЅВЮ┤ ВЌєВіхвІѕвІц.`;return;} tb.innerHTML=state.worklogMaterialDrafts.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}`).join(''); } function addWorklogMat(){state.worklogMaterialDrafts.push({material:'',supName:'',lotNo:'',inputQty:'',inputTime:''});renderWorklogMats();} /* РЋљРЋљРЋљ SPC / Ж│хВаЋвіЦваЦ вХёВёЮ - ьЈЅЖ░ђв│┤Ж│аВёю ьєхьЋЕьўЋ РЋљРЋљРЋљ */ const SPC_SPECS={ 'ВаљвЈё':{lsl:1200, target:1500, usl:1800, unit:'cP', spec:'1,500 ┬▒ 300 cP', mode:'both', report:'VIS-2026-001', capabilityLabel:'Cpk'}, 'Ж│аьўЋвХё':{lsl:19.0, target:20.0, usl:21.0, unit:'wt.%', spec:'20.0 ┬▒ 1.0 wt.%', mode:'both', report:'SOLID-2026-001', capabilityLabel:'Cpk'}, 'ВѕўвХё':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:2000, unit:'ppm', spec:'РЅц 2,000 ppm', mode:'upper', report:'MOIST-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, 'Dmax':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:10.0, unit:'╬╝m', spec:'РЅц 10.0 ╬╝m', mode:'upper', report:'DMAX-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, 'ВаЉВ░ЕваЦ':{lsl:400, target:'', usl:'', unit:'gf/12.7mm', spec:'РЅЦ 400 gf/12.7mm', mode:'lower', report:'ADH-2026-001', oneSided:'lower', capabilityLabel:'Cpl', convert:'adhesion'}, 'ВаѕВЌ░ВађьЋГ':{lsl:200, target:'', usl:'', unit:'M╬Е / OVER FLOW', spec:'РЅЦ 200 M╬Е вўљвіћ OVER FLOW', mode:'overflow', report:'IR-2026-001', oneSided:'lower', capabilityLabel:'Pass/Fail'}, 'ВаѕВЌ░ВЋА ьїйВюцВё▒':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:120, unit:'%', spec:'РЅц 120 %', mode:'upper', report:'SWELL-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'}, 'ьїйВюцВё▒':{lsl:'', target:'', usl:120, unit:'%', spec:'РЅц 120 %', mode:'upper', report:'SWELL-2026-001', oneSided:'upper', capabilityLabel:'Cpu'} }; const SPC_CONST={2:{A2:1.88,D3:0,D4:3.267,d2:1.128},3:{A2:1.023,D3:0,D4:2.574,d2:1.693},4:{A2:0.729,D3:0,D4:2.282,d2:2.059},5:{A2:0.577,D3:0,D4:2.115,d2:2.326},6:{A2:0.483,D3:0,D4:2.004,d2:2.534},7:{A2:0.419,D3:0.076,D4:1.924,d2:2.704},8:{A2:0.373,D3:0.136,D4:1.864,d2:2.847},9:{A2:0.337,D3:0.184,D4:1.816,d2:2.970},10:{A2:0.308,D3:0.223,D4:1.777,d2:3.078}}; function fmtNum(v,d=3){return Number.isFinite(v)?Number(v).toLocaleString('ko-KR',{maximumFractionDigits:d,minimumFractionDigits:d}).replace(/\.000$/,''):'-';} function normCdf(x){return 0.5*(1+erf(x/Math.SQRT2));} function erf(x){const sign=x>=0?1:-1;x=Math.abs(x);const a1=0.254829592,a2=-0.284496736,a3=1.421413741,a4=-1.453152027,a5=1.061405429,p=0.3275911;const t=1/(1+p*x);const y=1-(((((a5*t+a4)*t)+a3)*t+a2)*t+a1)*t*Math.exp(-x*x);return sign*y;} function spcBadge(j){const cls=(j==='Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ'||j==='ьЋЕЖ▓Е'||j==='Вџ░Вѕў'||j==='ВќЉьўИ')?'pass':(j==='ВБ╝ВЮў'||j==='ВА░В╣ўьЋёВџћ')?'hold':'fail';return `${esc(j||'-')}`;} function spcPill(j){const cls=(j==='Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ'||j==='ьЋЕЖ▓Е'||j==='PASS')?'good':(j==='Ж▓ђьєа'||j==='ВА░В╣ўьЋёВџћ')?'warn':'bad';return `${esc(j||'-')}`;} function spcRows(){return state.spcRows||[];} function spcFlatValues(rows=spcRows()){ return rows.flatMap(r=>(r.values||[]) .map(v=>typeof cellNum==='function'?cellNum(v):(String(v??'').trim()===''?NaN:Number(v))) .filter(Number.isFinite) ); } function spcGetSpec(){const item=$('spcItem')?.value||'Dmax';const base=SPC_SPECS[item]||SPC_SPECS['Dmax'];return {...base,item,lsl:$('spcLsl')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcLsl')?.value),target:$('spcTarget')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcTarget')?.value),usl:$('spcUsl')?.value===''?NaN:Number($('spcUsl')?.value),unit:$('spcUnit')?.value||base.unit,criteria:Number($('spcCpkStd')?.value||1.33),n:Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5),A2:Number($('spcA2')?.value||0.577),D3:Number($('spcD3')?.value||0),D4:Number($('spcD4')?.value||2.115),d2:Number($('spcD2')?.value||2.326)};} function applySpcSpec(){const item=$('spcItem')?.value||'Dmax';const spec=SPC_SPECS[item]||SPC_SPECS['Dmax'];if($('spcLsl'))$('spcLsl').value=spec.lsl;if($('spcTarget'))$('spcTarget').value=spec.target;if($('spcUsl'))$('spcUsl').value=spec.usl;if($('spcUnit'))$('spcUnit').value=spec.unit;if($('spcProcess'))$('spcProcess').value=spec.spec;if($('spcReportNo')&&!$('spcReportNo').value)$('spcReportNo').value=spec.report;if($('spcSpecText'))$('spcSpecText').textContent=spec.spec;const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5);const c=SPC_CONST[n]||SPC_CONST[5];if($('spcA2'))$('spcA2').value=c.A2;if($('spcD3'))$('spcD3').value=c.D3;if($('spcD4'))$('spcD4').value=c.D4;if($('spcD2'))$('spcD2').value=c.d2;spcRecalc(false);} function parseSpcValues(){const txt=($('spcValues')?.value||'').replace(/,/g,' ');return txt.split(/[\s\t\n\r]+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean).map(x=>Number(x)).filter(Number.isFinite);} function spcSetRowsFromFlat(values,lots=[]){const n=Number($('spcSubgroup')?.value||5);state.spcRows=[];for(let i=0;iv===0||v>=spec.lsl);return values.every(v=>(!Number.isFinite(spec.lsl)||v>=spec.lsl)&&(!Number.isFinite(spec.usl)||v<=spec.usl));} function calcSpc(rows=spcRows(),spec=spcGetSpec()){ const values=spcFlatValues(rows);const n=values.length;if(n<2)return null; const mean=values.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/n;const variance=values.reduce((a,b)=>a+(b-mean)**2,0)/(n-1);const overall=Math.sqrt(variance);const min=Math.min(...values),max=Math.max(...values); const sub=rows.map((r,i)=>{const vals=(r.values||[]).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);const xb=vals.length?vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length:NaN;const rr=vals.length?Math.max(...vals)-Math.min(...vals):NaN;return {...r,idx:i+1,xbar:xb,range:rr,specJudge:spcSpecOK(vals,spec)?'Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е'};}).filter(r=>Number.isFinite(r.xbar)); const k=sub.length;const rbar=sub.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.range,0)/(k||1);const within=(spec.d2&&rbar>=0)?rbar/spec.d2:NaN; const xbarUcl=mean+spec.A2*rbar,xbarCl=mean,xbarLcl=mean-spec.A2*rbar,rUcl=spec.D4*rbar,rCl=rbar,rLcl=Math.max(0,spec.D3*rbar); let signals=[];sub.forEach(s=>{const badX=s.xbar>xbarUcl||s.xbarrUcl||s.range0){if(hasL&&hasU)cp=(spec.usl-spec.lsl)/(6*within);if(hasL)cpl=(mean-spec.lsl)/(3*within);if(hasU)cpu=(spec.usl-mean)/(3*within);if(hasL&&hasU)cpk=Math.min(cpl,cpu);else if(hasL)cpk=cpl;else if(hasU)cpk=cpu;} if(spec.mode!=='overflow'&&overall>0){if(hasL&&hasU)pp=(spec.usl-spec.lsl)/(6*overall);if(hasL)ppl=(mean-spec.lsl)/(3*overall);if(hasU)ppu=(spec.usl-mean)/(3*overall);if(hasL&&hasU)ppk=Math.min(ppl,ppu);else if(hasL)ppk=ppl;else if(hasU)ppk=ppu;} let ppmU=0,ppmL=0;if(overall>0&&spec.mode!=='overflow'){if(hasU)ppmU=(1-normCdf((spec.usl-mean)/overall))*1e6;if(hasL)ppmL=normCdf((spec.lsl-mean)/overall)*1e6;} const outU=hasU?values.filter(v=>v>spec.usl).length:0,outL=hasL?values.filter(v=>vv===0||v>=spec.lsl)?'Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е';else if(spec.mode==='upper')capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpu)?(cpu>=spec.criteria?'Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е'):'-'; else if(spec.mode==='lower')capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpl)?(cpl>=spec.criteria?'Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е'):'-'; else capFinal=Number.isFinite(cpk)?(cpk>=spec.criteria?'Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е'):'-'; const final=(specFinal==='Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ'&&controlFinal==='Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ'&&(capFinal==='Ж┤ђвдгВќЉьўИ'||capFinal==='-'))?'ьЋЕЖ▓Е':'вХѕьЋЕЖ▓Е'; const zBench=Number.isFinite(ppk)?ppk*3:NaN;return {n,k,mean,overall,within,min,max,rbar,sub,cp,cpu,cpl,cpk,pp,ppu,ppl,ppk,ppmU,ppmL,outU,outL,xbarUcl,xbarCl,xbarLcl,rUcl,rCl,rLcl,specFinal,controlFinal,capFinal,final,signals,zBench,values,spec}; } function spcCapabilityName(spec){ if(!spec)return 'віЦваЦВДђВѕў'; if(spec.mode==='upper')return 'Cpu (ВЃЂьЋю вІеВИА)'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return 'Cpl (ьЋўьЋю вІеВИА)'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Pass/Fail'; return 'Cpk'; } function spcCapabilityValue(r){ if(!r)return NaN; if(r.spec?.mode==='upper')return r.cpu; if(r.spec?.mode==='lower')return r.cpl; if(r.spec?.mode==='overflow')return NaN; return r.cpk; } function spcOverallCapabilityName(spec){ if(!spec)return 'Ppk'; if(spec.mode==='upper')return 'Ppu (ВЃЂьЋю вІеВИА)'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return 'Ppl (ьЋўьЋю вІеВИА)'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Pass/Fail'; return 'Ppk'; } function spcOverallCapabilityValue(r){ if(!r)return NaN; if(r.spec?.mode==='upper')return r.ppu; if(r.spec?.mode==='lower')return r.ppl; if(r.spec?.mode==='overflow')return NaN; return r.ppk; } function spcOneSidedNote(spec){ if(!spec)return ''; if(spec.mode==='upper')return 'ВЃЂьЋю вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е: LSL ВЌєВЮ┤ USL ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю Cpu/PpuвЦ╝ ВѓгВџЕьЋЕвІѕвІц.'; if(spec.mode==='lower')return 'ьЋўьЋю вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е: USL ВЌєВЮ┤ LSL ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю Cpl/PplВЮё ВѓгВџЕьЋЕвІѕвІц.'; if(spec.mode==='overflow')return 'Overflow/ьЋўьЋю ьїљВаЋ ьЋГвфЕ: ВѕўВ╣ў віЦваЦВДђВѕўв│┤вІц ЖиюЖ▓Е вДїВА▒ ВЌгвХђвЦ╝ Вџ░Вёа ьїљВаЋьЋЕвІѕвІц.'; return 'ВќЉВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е: LSL/USL ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю Cp/Cpk в░Ј Pp/PpkвЦ╝ ВѓгВџЕьЋЕвІѕвІц.'; } function spcRow(label,value,cls=''){return `${label}${value}`;} function renderSpcResult(r){const set=(id,v)=>{if($(id))$(id).textContent=v;};if(!r){['spcN','spcKpiK','spcMean','spcStd','spcCpk','spcJudge'].forEach(id=>set(id,'-'));if($('spcSpecModeNote'))$('spcSpecModeNote').textContent='вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ьЋГвфЕВЮђ Cp/Cpk вїђВІа Cpu вўљвіћ Cpl ЖИ░ВцђВю╝вАю ьїљВаЋьЋЕвІѕвІц. ВќЉВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ьЋГвфЕвДї Cp/CpkвЦ╝ ьЉюВІюьЋЕвІѕвІц.';return;}set('spcN',r.n);set('spcKpiK',r.k);set('spcMean',fmtNum(r.mean,3));set('spcStd',fmtNum(r.within,3));const capVal=spcCapabilityValue(r); set('spcCpk',Number.isFinite(capVal)?fmtNum(capVal,3):(r.spec?.mode==='overflow'?r.capFinal:'-')); const cpkCard=document.querySelector('#spcCpk')?.closest('.kpi')?.querySelector('.kpi-l'); if(cpkCard)cpkCard.textContent=spcCapabilityName(r.spec); set('spcJudge',r.final);if($('spcSpecModeNote'))$('spcSpecModeNote').textContent=spcOneSidedNote(r.spec);if($('spcCapabilityBody')){ const capName=spcCapabilityName(r.spec); const capVal=spcCapabilityValue(r); const overallName=spcOverallCapabilityName(r.spec); const overallVal=spcOverallCapabilityValue(r); let rows=[]; if(r.spec.mode==='both'){ rows=[ spcRow('Cp (Жх░вѓ┤)',Number.isFinite(r.cp)?fmtNum(r.cp,3):'-'), spcRow('Cpu',Number.isFinite(r.cpu)?fmtNum(r.cpu,3):'-'), spcRow('Cpl',Number.isFinite(r.cpl)?fmtNum(r.cpl,3):'-'), spcRow(spcCapabilityName(r.spec),Number.isFinite(spcCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcCapabilityValue(r),3):'-'), spcRow('Pp (ВаёВ▓┤)',Number.isFinite(r.pp)?fmtNum(r.pp,3):'-'), spcRow(spcOverallCapabilityName(r.spec),Number.isFinite(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r))?fmtNum(spcOverallCapabilityValue(r),3):'-') ]; }else if(r.spec.mode==='upper'||r.spec.mode==='lower'){ rows=[ spcRow(capName,Number.isFinite(capVal)?fmtNum(capVal,3):'-'), spcRow(overallName,Number.isFinite(overallVal)?fmtNum(overallVal,3):'-'), spcRow('Cp / Cpk','вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ВаюВЎИ'), spcRow('Pp / Ppk','вІеВИА ЖиюЖ▓Е ВаюВЎИ') ]; }else{ rows=[ spcRow('ьїљВаЋ в░ЕВІЮ','ьЋўьЋю/Overflow ЖиюЖ▓Е вДїВА▒ ВЌгвХђ'), spcRow('віЦваЦВДђВѕў','Ж│ёВѓ░ ВаюВЎИ'), spcRow('ЖиюЖ▓Е ьїљВаЋ',spcPill(r.specFinal)) ]; } rows=rows.concat([ spcRow('Within ¤Ѓ',fmtNum(r.within,3)+' '+r.spec.unit), spcRow('Overall ¤Ѓ',fmtNum(r.overall,3)+' '+r.spec.unit), spcRow('Z.Bench',Number.isFinite(r.zBench)?fmtNum(r.zBench,3):'-'), spcRow('ЖИ░Вцђ',r.spec.mode==='both'?'Cpk РЅЦ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):(r.spec.mode==='upper'?'Cpu РЅЦ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):(r.spec.mode==='lower'?'Cpl РЅЦ '+fmtNum(r.spec.criteria,2):r.spec.spec))), spcRow('ЖиюЖ▓Е ВюаьўЋ',spcOneSidedNote(r.spec)), spcRow('ВхюВбЁ ьїљВаЋ',spcPill(r.capFinal)) ]); $('spcCapabilityBody').innerHTML=rows.join(''); } if($('spcControlBody'))$('spcControlBody').innerHTML=[spcRow('ьЈЅЖиа Ж┤ђвдгВЃЂьЋю',fmtNum(r.xbarUcl,3)),spcRow('ьЈЅЖиа ВцЉВІгВёа',fmtNum(r.xbarCl,3)),spcRow('ьЈЅЖиа Ж┤ђвдгьЋўьЋю',fmtNum(r.xbarLcl,3)),spcRow('в▓ћВюё Ж┤ђвдгВЃЂьЋю',fmtNum(r.rUcl,3)),spcRow('в▓ћВюё ВцЉВІгВёа',fmtNum(r.rCl,3)),spcRow('в▓ћВюё Ж┤ђвдгьЋўьЋю',fmtNum(r.rLcl,3)),spcRow('Ж┤ђвдг
